summary: Scaling adversarial evaluation of large language models requires both a method for generating hard inputs and a reliable way to confirm that resulting failures are real. We present AdversaBench, an end-to-end red-teaming pipeline that mutates seed prompts with five structured operators, queries a target model, and confirms failures through a three-judge panel with a meta-judge tiebreaker. We report experiments on 45 seeds across three categories: reasoning, instruction-following, and tool use. Every seed produced a confirmed failure. Four findings stand out. First, operator effectiveness varies sharply by category: inject_distractor scores 0.00 mean reward on instruction-following seeds but 0.80-0.83 on reasoning and tool-use. Second, binary failure rate hides difficulty: instruction-following seeds required 2.4 attacker iterations on average versus 1.1 for other categories, a gap visible in survival curves. Third, pairwise judge agreement of 80-87% coexists with near-zero Cohen's kappa due to label skew; category-level disagreement rates are more informative. Fourth, adversarial prompts generated against Llama 3.1 8B transfer zero-shot to Llama 3.3 70B, suggesting the mutations exploit general behavioral patterns rather than model-specific weaknesses. Code, dataset, and analysis scripts are available at https://github.com/khanak0509/AdversaBench .

AI.tldr: AdversaBench是一个端到端红队测试流程，通过五个结构化算子变异种子提示，并采用三人陪审团加元评审的确认机制，在推理、指令遵循和工具使用三类45个种子上全部成功生成可确认的失败案例，揭示了算子效果随类别剧烈变化、二元失败率掩盖难度差异、类别级不一致率比Kappa更可靠、以及对抗提示可零样本跨模型迁移等关键发现。
AI.motivation: 针对大型语言模型（LLM）的对抗性评估面临两大挑战：如何生成有难度的攻击输入，以及如何可靠地确认模型输出确实是真实失败（而非误报）；现有方法在生成和确认两个环节仍存在不足，亟需一个端到端、可扩展且具有可靠确认机制的标准化红队测试流程。
AI.method: 提出AdversaBench端到端红队测试流程：采用五个结构化算子（包括inject_distractor等）对种子提示进行变异以生成对抗输入；查询目标模型后，通过一个三人评审团（three-judge panel）加元评审（meta-judge）作为决胜机制来确认模型失败；实验覆盖推理、指令遵循和工具使用三个类别的45个种子提示，并在Llama 3.1 8B和Llama 3.3 70B等模型上进行测试。
AI.result: 每个种子均产生可确认的失败；算子有效性在不同类别间差异显著，例如inject_distractor在指令遵循类上的平均奖励为0.00，而在推理和工具使用上为0.80–0.83；二元失败率掩盖了难度差异，指令遵循类种子平均需要2.4次攻击迭代，而其他类别仅需1.1次；成对评委一致性为80–87%，但由于标签偏斜，Cohen's kappa接近零，类别级不一致率更具信息量；针对Llama 3.1 8B生成的对抗提示可零样本迁移至Llama 3.3 70B。
AI.conclusion: 对抗提示在不同规模的模型间可零样本迁移，表明结构化算子所利用的是模型通用的行为模式而非模型特定的弱点；传统的二元失败率和Cohen's kappa在评估对抗性攻击难度和评审一致性时存在显著局限，类别级细粒度指标更具实际意义；AdversaBench提供了一个系统化的对抗评估框架，并为未来的红队测试标准化提供了方法论参考。

title: ATRIA: Adaptive Traceable ECG Reporting with Iterative Agents
summary: Existing ECG report generation is tightly coupled -- interpretation and reporting fused end-to-end, so errors propagate without stage-level recourse -- while agent-based systems decouple tasks but remain single-pass, never revisiting earlier outputs. Clinical ECG reporting instead unfolds iteratively, requiring progressive context integration and bidirectional editing. We present \textsc{ATRIA}, a multi-agent ECG reporting system that mirrors the clinician's iterative workflow: it binds every report claim to its supporting evidence, flags statements unsupported by that evidence, incorporates additional context mid-session, and lets clinicians verify and revise individual findings rather than accept one opaque output. Because its agents use ECG analysis models already in clinical use, the underlying findings are clinically trustworthy; and as a cloud-based web service, \textsc{ATRIA} is ready for immediate deployment. We demonstrate \textsc{ATRIA} through four interaction cases, with a live demo and video available.

AI.tldr: ATRIA 是一个多智能体 ECG 报告生成系统，通过将每个报告声明绑定到临床证据、标记未支持的陈述、支持中间上下文整合以及允许医生验证和修改单个发现，模拟临床医生迭代式工作流程，解决了传统端到端 ECG 报告系统中错误传播和缺乏可审查性的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有 ECG 报告生成方法存在两类问题：端到端融合方法将解释与报告生成耦合，导致错误逐级传播且无法在阶段层面进行干预；基于智能体的系统虽然解耦了任务，但仍然是单次通过，无法回溯和修正早期输出。临床 ECG 报告实际上是迭代展开的，需要渐进式上下文整合和双向编辑，因此现有方法在可审查性和灵活性方面存在明显不足。
AI.method: ATRIA 提出一个多智能体 ECG 报告系统，其核心设计包括：将每个报告声明绑定到其支持证据，标记缺乏证据支持的陈述，允许在会话中间引入额外上下文，并赋予医生验证和修改单个发现的能力而非接受单一不透明输出。系统使用的 ECG 分析模型均为已在临床使用的模型，确保底层发现的临床可信性，同时作为基于云的 web 服务部署，可直接投入使用。
AI.result: 论文通过四个交互案例展示了 ATRIA 系统的功能，并提供了实时演示和视频，表明系统能够有效支持迭代式、可审查的 ECG 报告生成流程。论文未报告传统量化指标（如 BLEU、ROUGE）或临床准确性基准，而是以交互案例的形式进行定性展示。
AI.conclusion: ATRIA 通过模拟临床医生的迭代工作流程，为 ECG 报告生成提供了一种更贴近实际临床实践的解决方案，其基于已有临床模型的架构确保了临床可信度，而云服务部署模式支持快速落地应用。该系统在可审查性、可编辑性和渐进式上下文整合方面优于传统端到端或单次通过方法。

title: TuringViT: Making SOTA Vision Transformers Accessible to All
summary: Modern VLMs and VLA systems commonly adopt off-the-shelf ViTs such as SigLIP2 as visual encoders, but diverse downstream requirements in latency, temporal modeling, and VLM integration often call for customized SOTA-level ViTs. Training such encoders remains beyond the reach of much of the community, as it requires massive image-text data, while standard softmax attention makes high-resolution or dynamic-resolution pretraining prohibitively costly and often forces low-resolution pretraining followed by post-hoc adaptation. TuringViT addresses these challenges with three key designs: Turing Linear Attention (TLA) for efficient sequence modeling, VISTA-Curation to construct supervision-rich image-video training data, and native dynamic-resolution pretraining that supports flexible inputs from the start and transfers seamlessly to downstream VLMs. As a result, TuringViT outperforms leading open-source ViT baselines with only 10% of the data, achieves stronger downstream VLM performance, and delivers substantially better latency scaling on high-resolution inputs. Our scaling-law analysis further shows that TuringViT continues to improve predictably with curated data scale, far from saturation. Its fast adaptation, hardware-friendly design, and efficient deployment have made it a unified visual foundation across XPeng's AI systems. More broadly, TuringViT provides a reproducible pipeline that dramatically lowers the cost for the community to train, customize, and deploy SOTA-level ViTs, moving toward making such Vision Transformers accessible to all.

AI.tldr: TuringViT 提出 Turing Linear Attention、VISTA-Curation 数据构建和原生动态分辨率预训练三大设计，以极低数据成本训练出性能领先的视觉编码器，并作为统一视觉基座部署于 XPeng 的 AI 系统，大幅降低了社区训练和定制 SOTA 级 ViT 的门槛。
AI.motivation: 现有 VLM 和 VLA 系统普遍使用 SigLIP2 等现成 ViT 作为视觉编码器，但下游任务对延迟、时序建模和 VLM 集成有高度定制化的需求。然而，训练 SOTA 级 ViT 需要海量图像-文本数据，且标准 softmax 注意力在高分辨率或动态分辨率预训练中计算成本过高，迫使社区采用低分辨率预训练加后处理适配的方式，极大地限制了定制化 ViT 的可及性。
AI.method: TuringViT 提出三项核心设计：一是 Turing Linear Attention (TLA)，实现高效的序列建模以降低注意力计算复杂度；二是 VISTA-Curation，构建富含监督信号的图像-视频训练数据；三是原生动态分辨率预训练策略，从训练伊始即支持灵活输入分辨率，并可无缝迁移至下游 VLM 系统。
AI.result: TuringViT 仅使用 10% 的数据量即超越主流开源 ViT 基线，在下游 VLM 上取得更强的性能，并在高分辨率输入下展现出显著更优的延迟缩放特性。缩放宽律分析表明，TuringViT 的性能随策展数据规模呈可预测的提升，远未达到饱和状态。
AI.conclusion: TuringViT 的快速适配能力、硬件友好设计和高效率部署使其成为 XPeng AI 系统的统一视觉基座。更重要的是，该方法提供了一条可复现的 pipeline，大幅降低了社区训练、定制和部署 SOTA 级 ViT 的成本，朝着让这类 Vision Transformer 普惠化迈出了关键一步。

title: Agentic AI for Bilevel Long-Term Optimization of Policy-Driven Physical Layer Systems
summary: Network operators' changing policies, service requirements, and stringent real-time constraints render existing methods designed with fixed objectives and constraints ineffective. This paper presents Agentic long-term performance optimization (Agentic-LTPO), a nested bilevel optimization framework that can be applied to adaptive physical layer problem configuration. The key idea is to employ agentic AI to generate upper-level configurations in a bilevel optimization structure, where evolving operator policies, environment summaries, and historical experiences are translated into structured lower-level optimization problem configurations. The lower level solves the problems with updated configurations for real-time physical-layer decisions. Considering cell-free MIMO beamforming as a use case, we embody Agentic-LTPO by designing a new multi-agent decision process with retrieval-augmented experience-based verification in the upper level, together with a closed-form beamformer in the lower level. Experiments demonstrate that Agentic-LTPO exhibits strong adaptability to dynamic operator policies and effectively enhances the system's long-term performance by 57.2% compared to traditional methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Agentic-LTPO，一种基于智能体AI的嵌套双层优化框架，通过将动态运营商策略转化为结构化下层优化问题配置，实现自适应物理层长期性能优化，在无小区MIMO波束赋形场景中相比传统方法性能提升57.2%。
AI.motivation: 网络运营商策略、服务需求和实时约束的动态变化，使得传统基于固定目标和约束的优化方法难以有效应对，亟需一种能够自适应调整优化配置以匹配动态策略的长期性能优化框架。
AI.method: Agentic-LTPO采用嵌套双层优化结构，上层利用智能体AI（结合检索增强的经验验证机制）根据运营商策略、环境摘要和历史经验生成下层优化问题的配置，下层则以更新后的配置求解实时物理层决策问题；在无小区MIMO波束赋形用例中，上层设计为多智能体决策过程，下层采用闭式波束赋形器。
AI.result: 实验表明，Agentic-LTPO对动态运营商策略具有强适应性，相比传统方法将系统长期性能提升了57.2%。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了将智能体AI与双层优化相结合能够有效应对动态网络环境下的长期性能优化挑战，为自适应物理层问题配置提供了新的范式，对实现可持续性能优化具有重要启示。

title: Hierarchical Spatial and Channel Aggregation for Cross-domain Few-shot Segmentation
summary: Cross-domain Few-shot Segmentation (CD-FSS) aims to learn generalizable segmentation capability from abundant annotated samples in the source domain, enabling accurate segmentation of novel classes in the target domain with only a few annotated samples. Existing CD-FSS methods mainly focus on mitigating feature distribution shifts caused by style gaps while ignoring significant differences in class semantic granularity and discriminative attributes across domains, leading to two key degradations in support-query matching: semantic over-alignment and attribute over-alignment. To this end, we propose the Dual Hierarchical Aggregation Network (DHANet), which comprises three key modules. First, the Hierarchical Spatial Aggregation (HSA) module performs multi-scale region aggregation of pixel features along the spatial dimension, generating hierarchical semantic-enhanced features to alleviate semantic over-alignment. Additionally, the HCA module conducts multi-scale attribute aggregation along the channel dimension, generating hierarchical attribute-enhanced features to mitigate attribute over-alignment. Finally, we propose the Online Probabilistic Semantic Bank (OPSB), which progressively constructs and updates class probability distributions from query predictions during inference, and samples multiple pseudo-prototypes as additional support information to mitigate insufficient support. Extensive experiments on four target-domain datasets demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出双层次聚合网络（DHANet），通过层次化空间聚合缓解语义过对齐、层次化通道聚合缓解属性过对齐，并引入在线概率语义库补充支撑信息，在跨域小样本分割任务上取得最先进性能。
AI.motivation: 现有跨域小样本分割方法主要关注缓解由风格差异引起的特征分布偏移，却忽略了跨域类别语义粒度和判别属性的显著差异，导致支撑-查询匹配中出现语义过对齐和属性过对齐两种关键退化问题。
AI.method: 提出双层次聚合网络（DHANet），包含三个核心模块：层次化空间聚合（HSA）模块沿空间维度进行多尺度区域聚合，生成层次化语义增强特征以缓解语义过对齐；层次化通道聚合（HCA）模块沿通道维度进行多尺度属性聚合，生成层次化属性增强特征以缓解属性过对齐；在线概率语义库（OPSB）在推理过程中从查询预测逐步构建并更新类别概率分布，采样多个伪原型作为额外支撑信息以缓解支撑不足问题。
AI.result: 在四个目标域数据集上的大量实验表明，所提出的方法取得了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了跨域小样本分割中语义过对齐和属性过对齐两类关键退化问题，并证明通过层次化多尺度空间与通道聚合以及在线概率语义库构建可有效提升跨域分割泛化能力。

title: ReM-MoA: Reasoning Memory Sustains Mixture-of-Agents Scaling
summary: Mixture-of-Agents (MoA) architectures improve inference-time scaling by organizing multiple LLM agents into layered reasoning pipelines. However, existing MoA variants fail to sustain gains as depth increases, exhibiting degradation, early plateauing, or saturation. We propose ReM-MoA, a memory-augmented MoA framework that sustains scaling through two mechanisms: (1) a Ranked Reasoning Memory that persistently stores and ranks reasoning traces from all layers using a comparative Reviewer Agent, and (2) a Curated Diversified Memory Routing scheme that exposes different agents to distinct combinations of successful and failed traces, preserving exploration diversity while propagating high-quality reasoning. We further introduce an optional multi-domain Reviewer distillation pipeline that improves ranking quality through frontier-model supervision. Across five reasoning benchmarks spanning math, formal logic, code, knowledge, and commonsense, ReM-MoA consistently outperforms prior MoA variants across both depth and width scaling, and its advantage widens with depth, establishing structured cross-layer reasoning memory as a key missing mechanism for scalable multi-agent inference.

AI.tldr: ReM-MoA 提出了一种记忆增强的混合代理架构，通过排名推理记忆和多样化记忆路由机制解决了现有 MoA 随深度增加性能退化的问题，在多个推理基准上实现了更优且随深度持续提升的扩展性能。
AI.motivation: 现有混合代理架构在增加推理层数时会出现性能退化、早期平台期或饱和现象，难以通过深度扩展持续获得增益，亟需一种能维持深度扩展正收益的多代理推理框架。
AI.method: ReM-MoA 包含两个核心机制：一是排名推理记忆模块，通过比较式 Reviewer 代理对各层推理轨迹进行持久化存储与排名；二是多样化记忆路由方案，向不同代理暴露成功与失败轨迹的不同组合，在传播高质量推理的同时保持探索多样性。此外还引入可选的多领域 Reviewer 蒸馏流水线，利用前沿模型监督提升排名质量。
AI.result: 在涵盖数学、形式逻辑、代码、知识和常识的五个推理基准上，ReM-MoA 在深度和宽度两个扩展维度上均持续优于先前 MoA 变体，且其优势随深度增加而扩大。
AI.conclusion: 结构化的跨层推理记忆是实现可扩展多代理推理的关键缺失机制，ReM-MoA 验证了通过记忆增强可有效突破现有 MoA 架构的深度扩展瓶颈。

title: Ill-Posed by Design: Probing Evidence Use in VLMs
summary: Counterfactual analysis is widely used to study evidence use in vision-language models, but its diagnostic value is limited on well-posed tasks: when several cues independently support the same answer, removing one may not change the prediction. We propose monocular metric object-size estimation as an ill-posed diagnostic setting for evidence selection: because physical size cannot be determined from a single uncalibrated image, models must rely on imperfect cues category priors, target appearance, local context, apparent image size, and scene geometry. We assemble Metric VQA ($10{,}813$ dimension queries from Objectron and $331$ tape-measured in-the-wild scenes) and evaluate $12$ open-weight VLMs ($3$--$397$\,B parameters) with counterfactual analysis decomposing six visual and language evidence channels. Even the largest VLMs tested (Qwen3-VL-235B, Qwen3.5-397B, InternVL3.5-241B) trail a text-only frontier LLM on the in-the-wild split. The diagnostic analysis shows: target identity is the most load-bearing cue, target pixels and local context help only some models, apparent size shifts predictions without a directional readout, and global scene geometry is largely unused. We analyze LoRA fine-tuning as an actionable intervention specific to metric estimation: while the task is learnable, the models do not learn to leverage scene geometry.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将单目度量物体尺寸估计作为反事实分析的病态诊断任务，系统评估了12个开源视觉-语言模型（3B-397B参数）的证据选择行为。实验发现，即使最大的VLM在野外场景上仍落后于纯文本前沿LLM，模型主要依赖目标身份线索，而几乎不利用全局场景几何信息。
AI.motivation: 传统反事实分析在良态视觉问答任务中诊断价值有限，因为当多个线索独立支持同一答案时，移除单个线索不会改变预测结果。本文旨在通过单目度量物体尺寸估计这一病态任务，为视觉-语言模型的证据选择行为提供更具区分度的诊断框架。
AI.method: 本文构建了Metric VQA数据集（包含10,813个来自Objectron的尺寸查询和331张实地卷尺测量场景），对12个3B-397B参数的开源VLM进行反事实分析，分解了目标身份、目标像素、局部上下文、图像表观尺寸、场景几何和语言线索共六个证据通道。此外，还通过LoRA微调分析了模型在度量估计任务上的可学习性。
AI.result: 最大规模的VLM（Qwen3-VL-235B、Qwen3.5-397B、InternVL3.5-241B）在野外测试集上均落后于纯文本前沿LLM。反事实分析表明：目标身份是最关键线索，目标像素和局部上下文仅对部分模型有帮助，表观尺寸能改变预测但缺乏方向性读取能力，全局场景几何几乎未被利用。LoRA微调表明任务可学习，但模型仍未能学会利用场景几何信息。
AI.conclusion: 当前视觉-语言模型在需要综合多种视觉线索的病态推理任务中存在系统性局限，尤其缺乏对场景几何信息的有效利用。这揭示了VLM在视觉基础度量推理上的根本缺陷，并为未来模型设计（如显式注入几何推理能力）提供了明确的改进方向。

title: The Latent Bridge: A Continuous Slow-Fast Channel for Real-Time Game Agents
summary: A real-time agent for general computer use - with games as the most demanding case - must act within tens of milliseconds while still planning over seconds. These two regimes sit at opposite ends of the latency-quality tradeoff. A reasoning VLM (Qwen3-VL-8B-Thinking) deliberates effectively but requires ~1.5 s per response - far too slow for a 15 Hz control loop. In contrast, a reactive VLM (MiniCPM-o 4.5) acts in milliseconds but underperforms on planning-heavy tasks. We couple two frozen models of matched scale (9B reactive, 8B reasoning), leaving the communication channel as the sole trainable component. The standard coupling is a Text Bridge (T): the slow model writes a suffix the fast model reads. We introduce a learned continuous Latent Bridge (L) that projects the slow model's residuals into the fast model's input-embedding space in a LLaVA-style manner, avoiding any text round-trip; both are compared against Fast-Only (F). On 7 Atari games and a driving domain (MetaDrive), tuning the action decoder per channel on held-out seeds, the Latent Bridge matches or beats the Text Bridge in every domain: it significantly improves two games (MsPacman +57%, RoadRunner +28%) and is a safe drop-in elsewhere. Combining both channels interferes destructively (RoadRunner -96%), so only one should be used. The benefit is highly predictable: the bridge helps if and only if slow reasoning already beats fast reaction (T > F) - the Latent and Text gains over Fast-Only move together at r=0.93. MetaDrive is the controlled negative, where the Latent Bridge is demonstrably inert because the Text Bridge adds no value. We release replay recordings and reproducible pipelines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种延迟桥接（Latent Bridge）方法，将慢速推理VLM（Qwen3-VL-8B-Thinking）的连续残差通过LLaVA方式投影到快速反应VLM（MiniCPM-o 4.5）的输入嵌入空间，无需文本中转即可实现数十毫秒级实时控制与数秒级规划的融合；在7个Atari游戏和MetaDrive驾驶任务上，Latent Bridge在所有领域匹配或超越文本桥接，且只有当慢推理优于快反应时桥接才有效（r=0.93），MetaDrive为受控负例证实其惰性。
AI.motivation: 计算机通用实时智能体（尤以游戏为最苛刻场景）需在数十毫秒内执行动作的同时进行数秒级规划，而推理型VLM（~1.5s/响应）与反应型VLM（毫秒级但规划能力弱）分别位于延迟-质量权衡的两端，现有方法无法同时满足这两种相互冲突的实时性要求。
AI.method: 本文耦合两个规模匹配的冻结模型（9B反应型MiniCPM-o 4.5与8B推理型Qwen3-VL-8B-Thinking），仅训练通信通道；提出连续潜在桥接（Latent Bridge, L）技术：将慢模型推理产生的残差通过LLaVA风格投影到快模型输入嵌入空间，避免文本往返延迟；与文本桥接（Text Bridge, T，慢模型写后缀供快模型读取）和仅快模型基线（Fast-Only, F）进行对比，并在每个通道上单独微调动作解码器。
AI.result: 在7个Atari游戏和MetaDrive驾驶任务上，Latent Bridge在所有领域匹配或超越Text Bridge：在MsPacman提升+57%、RoadRunner提升+28%，其余任务安全持平；两者混用产生破坏性干扰（RoadRunner下降-96%），故应仅使用单一通道；桥接收益高度可预测（r=0.93），仅在慢推理优于快反应时（T > F）有效；MetaDrive作为受控负例证实Latent Bridge在该场景下无增益。
AI.conclusion: 连续潜在桥接可作为一种安全、高性能且零文本开销的实时智能体设计范式，将慢推理与快反应有效融合而不引入额外延迟；桥接收益的强可预测性（r=0.93）为实际部署提供了决策依据——仅在推理模型本身优于反应模型时启用桥接；未来可探索多模态桥接与更大规模模型组合，并进一步验证其在更广泛实时任务中的泛化能力。

title: Open-Vocabulary BEV Segmentation with 3D-Aware Geometric Constraints
comment: This paper has been accepted by ECCV 2026
summary: Bird's-eye view (BEV) perception fuses multi-camera images into a unified top-down representation for autonomous driving. Despite recent progress, state-of-the-art methods remain confined to closed-set scenarios, making them vulnerable to unpredictable real-world environments. In this work, we introduce open-vocabulary BEV segmentation (OVBS), which leverages vision-language models (VLMs) to recognize categories beyond the training set while maintaining precise BEV perception and real-time efficiency. A key challenge in OVBS lies in the 3D geometric inconsistency inherent in the ill-posed lifting of 2D VLM semantics into BEV. To address this, we propose OVBEVSeg, a geometry-aware OVBS framework that enhances efficient Gaussian splatting (GS)-based unprojection by leveraging robust 3D geometric constraints across three progressive stages: (1) 2D-to-BEV pseudo-labeling via reliable 3D projection for OV generalization; (2) joint 2D-BEV per-scene optimization with BEV structural constraints for 3D geometric consistency; and (3) 3D geometric distillation for online efficiency. On the nuScenes dataset, OVBEVSeg achieves state-of-the-art performance, outperforming closed-set methods by 15.3 mIoU on unseen categories. Remarkably, even with no novel-class ground-truth labels, it remains competitive with self- and semi-supervised baselines trained with up to 40% of ground-truth annotations. Furthermore, it achieves 2.5x faster inference with only 0.22x the memory consumption of projection-based methods. Project page: https://hchoi256.github.io/projects/ovbevseg/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出OVBEVSeg，一种基于高斯泼溅的几何感知开放词汇BEV分割框架，通过三阶段渐进式优化（2D-to-BEV伪标注、联合2D-BEV场景优化、3D几何蒸馏）解决VLM语义升维到BEV时的3D几何不一致问题，在nuScenes数据集上未见类别mIoU超越闭集方法15.3，推理速度提升2.5倍且显存仅为投影法的0.22倍。
AI.motivation: 现有BEV感知方法局限于闭集场景，难以应对开放世界中不可预测的类别，且将2D视觉-语言模型语义提升至BEV时存在固有的3D几何不一致性问题，亟需一种既能识别开放词汇类别又能保持精确BEV感知和实时效率的框架。
AI.method: OVBEVSeg构建了三阶段渐进式优化框架：阶段一通过可靠的3D投影生成2D-to-BEV伪标签以支持开放词汇泛化；阶段二联合2D和BEV进行逐场景优化，施加BEV结构约束以保证3D几何一致性；阶段三通过3D几何蒸馏实现在线推理效率。框架利用高效的高斯泼溅（Gaussian Splatting）进行非投影操作，替代传统投影方法以降低计算和存储开销。
AI.result: 在nuScenes数据集上，OVBEVSeg在未见类别上mIoU超越闭集方法15.3；即便完全不使用新类真实标签，其在未见类别上的表现仍能与使用多达40%真实标注的自监督和半监督基线方法相竞争；推理速度达到投影方法的2.5倍，显存消耗仅为投影方法的0.22倍。
AI.conclusion: OVBEVSeg证明了利用2D VLM和3D几何约束可以在不依赖新类标注的情况下高效实现开放词汇BEV分割，兼顾了泛化能力、几何一致性与实时性，为自动驾驶等开放环境感知任务提供了可行方向。

title: Reinforcement Learning for Computer-Use Agents with Autonomous Evaluation
comment: Accepted to the 4th International Workshop on Generalizing from Limited Resources in the Open World (GLOW @ IJCAI 2026)
summary:
Computer-Use Agents (CUAs) execute high-level user goals by perceiving and acting directly within graphical user interfaces. However, reinforcement learning for CUAs remains difficult because open-ended desktop environments rarely provide scalable, machine-readable reward signals: task success is often visually grounded and hard to specify with handcrafted reward functions or dense manual labels.
  We propose an RL fine-tuning framework that uses autonomous vision-language evaluation as a scalable supervision signal for GUI agents. Given a final screenshot and the original instruction, a Vision-Language Model judges task completion and provides terminal feedback without task-specific heuristics or manual labels during policy optimization.
  Because autonomous evaluators are imperfect, we model their feedback as a noisy binary reward channel and derive a noise-corrected reward estimator for Proximal Policy Optimization. Experiments across macOSWorld, Windows Agent Arena, and OSWorld show that corrected evaluator rewards outperform both zero-shot baselines and raw evaluator rewards, improving success rates by an average of 12.6 percentage points over zero-shot performance and 5.1 points over raw evaluator fine-tuning. These results suggest that autonomous evaluation can serve as a practical reward signal for RL in GUI environments when evaluator noise is explicitly modeled and corrected.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种利用视觉语言模型作为自主评估器来提供RL可扩展奖励信号的框架，并通过噪声校正机制改进PPO优化，在多个GUI智能体基准上显著提升了任务成功率。
AI.motivation: 计算机使用智能体（CUA）在开放桌面环境中难以应用强化学习，因为任务成功往往依赖视觉判断，人工设计奖励函数或密集标注难以扩展，缺乏可规模化且机器可读的奖励信号。
AI.method: 提出一个RL微调框架，利用视觉语言模型（VLM）作为自主评估器，根据最终截图和原始指令判断任务完成情况并提供终端反馈；将评估器的反馈建模为含噪声的二元奖励通道，推导出噪声校正的奖励估计器用于近端策略优化（PPO），从而在策略优化过程中无需任务特定的启发式规则或人工标注。
AI.result: 在macOSWorld、Windows Agent Arena和OSWorld三个基准上，噪声校正后的评估器奖励在成功率上相比零样本基线平均提升12.6个百分点，相比原始评估器奖励微调提升5.1个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 自主评估可作为一种实用的GUI环境RL奖励信号，但关键前提是需显式建模并校正评估器中的噪声；该方法为在开放桌面环境中规模化训练CUA提供了可行路径。

title: SignNet-1M: Large-Scale Multilingual Sign Language Video Dataset with Downstream Benchmarks
summary: Sign language models are typically trained on datasets captured under constrained conditions, with limited viewpoint, background, and signer-identity diversity, leading to poor robustness under real-world distribution shifts. We introduce SignNet-1M, a large-scale augmented dataset spanning ASL, CSL, and German Sign Language (DGS). SignNet-1M synthesizes realistic variations along three axes: (i) novel-view rendering (rotation and zoom) via 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS), (ii) scene/identity editing via diffusion models for background replacement and signer substitution while preserving sign motion and linguistic content, and (iii) post-rendering augmentations that emulate capture and compression artifacts (e.g., pose/temporal perturbations and video-level corruptions) to better match in-the-wild recordings. Beyond data release, we provide a unified benchmark suite across downstream tasks (e.g., translation and recognition) and ablations that isolate each augmentation component. Experiments across backbones show that training with SignNet-1M consistently improves generalization under cross-view, cross-background, cross-identity, and post-rendering shifts, while maintaining strong in-distribution performance. The dataset, full augmentation pipeline, and benchmark are available at https://signnet.chatsign.ai/.

AI.tldr: SignNet-1M 是一个大规模增广手语数据集，通过 3D 高斯泼溅、扩散模型和视频级增强合成跨视角、背景、身份和采集失真的多样化变体，有效提升了手语模型在真实分布偏移下的泛化性能。
AI.motivation: 现有手语模型通常在受限条件下采集的数据集上训练，其视角、背景和手语者身份的多样性有限，导致在真实世界的分布偏移下鲁棒性较差，缺乏系统性的数据增广方法来解决这一泛化鸿沟。
AI.method: SignNet-1M 涵盖了 ASL、CSL 和 DGS 三种手语，沿三条轴合成现实变体：(i) 通过 3D 高斯泼溅 (3DGS) 实现新颖视角渲染（旋转和缩放）；(ii) 利用扩散模型进行场景/身份编辑，实现背景替换和手语者替换同时保留手部动作和语言内容；(iii) 采用模拟采集与压缩伪影的后渲染增强（如姿态/时间扰动和视频级损坏）。此外还提供了统一的基准测试套件和消融实验以隔离各增广组件的影响。
AI.result: 在多种主干网络上的实验表明，使用 SignNet-1M 训练能够持续提升模型在跨视角、跨背景、跨身份和后渲染偏移下的泛化能力，同时保持强分布内性能，证明了各增广轴对鲁棒性的贡献。
AI.conclusion: SignNet-1M 及其完整增广流水线为提升手语模型在真实世界分布偏移下的鲁棒性提供了一种系统化数据增强方案，并建立了统一的评测基准，为未来多语言手语识别与翻译研究提供了可复现的数据基础和方法参考。

title: Governed Shared Memory for Multi-Agent LLM Systems
summary: Multi-agent LLM environments require robust mechanisms for shared knowledge management. This paper formalizes the fleet-memory problem and identifies four foundational failure modes: unauthorized leakage, stale propagation, contradiction persistence, and provenance collapse. To address these, we define explicit systems-level primitives: scoped retrieval, temporal supersession, provenance tracking, and policy-governed memory propagation. These primitives are implemented in MemClaw, a production multi-tenant memory service, and evaluated via ArgusFleet, a reproducible harness testing four governance dimensions. Rather than a baseline comparison, this study measures a live production service, emphasizing real-world architectural insights and negative results. Key Evaluation Results Provenance: Successfully reconstructed 100% of depth-four derivation chains with correct writer identity at sub-second per-hop latency. Propagation: Demonstrated high intra-fleet visibility with zero cross-fleet leakage. Under strong write mode, write-to-visible latency was optimized to a single search round-trip. Production Architectural Issues Discovered Asymmetric Scope Enforcement: Tenant isolation held, but sub-tenant scope was initially bypassed on direct GET-by-id requests for agent-scoped credentials (disclosed and remediated during the study). Pipeline Ordering Conflict: While contradiction supersession works for admitted writes, a synchronous near-duplicate gate can prematurely reject contradictory writes before the asynchronous contradiction detector can evaluate them. Conclusion: Long-context retrieval alone is insufficient for production multi-agent memory. Governed shared memory demands explicit systems-level abstractions, and live evaluation is vital to expose enforcement and pipeline-ordering failures missed by design-only treatments.

AI.tldr: 该论文形式化定义了多智能体LLM环境中的fleet-memory问题，识别了四种故障模式，提出了显式系统级原语并在生产服务MemClaw中实现，通过ArgusFleet测试框架验证了治理维度的有效性，同时揭示了仅靠长上下文检索无法满足生产级多智能体共享内存需求。
AI.motivation: 多智能体LLM环境缺乏鲁棒的共享知识管理机制，现有方法面临未经授权的信息泄漏、过时传播、矛盾持久化和来源崩溃等系统级故障模式，而长上下文检索等单一手段无法解决生产环境中的多智能体内存治理问题。
AI.method: 论文形式化定义了四种故障模式，并提出四类显式系统级原语：作用域检索、时间超弛、来源追踪和策略驱动的内存传播；这些原语在MemClaw生产级多租户内存服务中实现，并通过ArgusFleet可复现测试框架在四个治理维度上进行评估。
AI.result: 来源追踪实现了100%的深度四层推导链重建且子秒级每跳延迟；传播机制实现高舰队内可见性和零跨舰队泄漏，在强写入模式下写后可见延迟优化至单次搜索往返；同时发现两个生产架构问题：非对称作用域强制导致子租户作用域在直接GET-by-id请求中可被绕过，以及同步近重复门控可能提前拒绝矛盾写入。
AI.conclusion: 长上下文检索不足以支撑生产级多智能体共享内存，显式系统级抽象是治理共享内存的必要条件，而真实生产环境评估对于暴露设计阶段难以发现的执行和流水线排序故障至关重要。

title: Structural Kolmogorov-Arnold Convolutions: Learnable Function on the Values or the Filter Shape as Parameter-Efficient Alternative to Per-Edge Convolutional KANs
summary: Convolutional Kolmogorov--Arnold Networks (KANs) replace the fixed weights of a convolutional kernel with learnable univariate functions. The dominant formulation attaches one such function to every kernel entry and lets it act on pixel values, expressive but parameter-heavy and prone to overfitting. We argue that the learnable functions are better placed in the \emph{structure} of the convolution than on each edge, and we organise the design space along a single axis: whether the function acts on the pixel \emph{values} or on the filter \emph{shape}. We study three realisations. SV-KAN applies one shared univariate function to the values and leaves the spatial filter free and static, aa classical convolution with a single learnable shared activation. AG-KAN keeps the shared value function but supplies the spatial structure through a content-adaptive Gaussian gate. RF-KAN instead moves the learnable functions onto the filter shape, building each filter from oriented ridge profiles expanded in a localised oscillatory (Morlet) wavelet basis with content-adaptive amplitudes. Under a matched four-layer protocol with in-run references and three seeds, RF-KAN and SV-KAN reach $88.47\pm0.10\%$ and $88.20\pm0.31\%$ on CIFAR-10 and $64.40\pm0.19\%$ and $64.57\pm0.30\%$ on CIFAR-100, at about $0.4$M parameters. At this matched scale the shape model and the simplest value model meet at the top, both above a plain convolution and every per-edge KAN we tested, including the official Gram variant, at roughly a fifth of the parameters. A controlled study attributes the RF-KAN gain to an intrinsically localised oscillatory basis and to content adaptivity, and an ablation that removes the learned shape entirely, leaving only the shared value function, collapses accuracy by over forty points, identifying the learned shape as the load-bearing ingredient at this scale.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将卷积KAN中的可学习函数置于卷积结构而非逐边连接上，沿着函数作用于像素值还是滤波器形状这一轴组织设计空间，并验证了基于共享值函数的SV-KAN和基于形状建模的RF-KAN在极低参数量下超越传统卷积和逐边KAN变体。
AI.motivation: 现有卷积KAN（Kolmogorov–Arnold Networks）为每个卷积核条目附加独立可学习单变量函数，虽表达能力强但参数量大且易过拟合，本文旨在通过将可学习函数合理置于卷积结构层面而非逐边上，在保持表达能力的同时显著降低参数量并提升泛化性能。
AI.method: 本文沿单一设计轴组织空间：可学习函数作用于像素值还是滤波器形状。提出三种实现：SV-KAN对像素值应用共享单变量函数保留固定空间滤波器（类似经典卷积加共享激活）；AG-KAN保持共享值函数但通过内容自适应高斯门控提供空间结构；RF-KAN将可学习函数移至滤波器形状，每个滤波器由定向脊轮廓构建并展开为局部振荡Morlet小波基，振幅内容自适应。
AI.result: 在匹配的四层协议下，RF-KAN和SV-KAN在CIFAR-10上分别达到88.47±0.10%和88.20±0.31%精度，在CIFAR-100上分别达到64.40±0.19%和64.57±0.30%精度，参数量仅约0.4M；均超越普通卷积和所有测试的逐边KAN变体（包括官方Gram变体），参数量仅为后者的约五分之一；去除学习形状仅保留共享值函数导致精度下降超过四十个百分点，表明学习形状是该尺度下的关键成分。
AI.conclusion: 在匹配小参数量下，形状模型（RF-KAN）与最简单值模型（SV-KAN）性能持平并共同领先，说明卷积KAN设计空间的有效探索可从结构和形状入手而非堆叠逐边函数；RF-KAN的增益来源于局部振荡小波基和内容自适应，而学习形状是该尺度下负载关键成分，为轻量高效卷积KAN设计提供了新方向。

title: GUI vs. CLI: Execution Bottlenecks in Screen-Only and Skill-Mediated Computer-Use Agents
summary: Computer-use agents can execute software tasks through either graphical interfaces or programmatic command interfaces, but existing evaluations confound interaction modality with differences in tasks, initial states, verifiers, and permitted actions. We introduce a matched execution-layer benchmark of 440 desktop tasks across 18 applications and 12 workflow categories, where screen-only GUI agents and skill-mediated CLI agents receive identical goals, states, and final-state verifiers while being restricted to modality-native actions. In this controlled setting, the strongest GUI agent reaches a 59.1% full pass rate, outperforming the strongest original-skill CLI agent at 48.2%; however, verifier-guided skill augmentation raises CLI success to 69.3%, showing that much of the CLI deficit comes from incomplete skill coverage rather than model capability alone. These results suggest that GUI and CLI expose different execution bottlenecks: GUI agents are limited by reliable grounded interaction over long-horizon workflows, whereas CLI agents are limited by the coverage and scalability of their skill interfaces.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过构建匹配的执行层基准(440个桌面任务)对GUI和CLI智能体进行公平对比，发现最优GUI智能体成功率为59.1%，优于原始CLI智能体的48.2%，但通过验证器引导的技能增强可将CLI成功率提升至69.3%，揭示了两类智能体不同的执行瓶颈：GUI受限于长程工作流中的可靠交互，CLI受限于技能接口的覆盖范围与可扩展性。
AI.motivation: 现有计算机使用智能体的评估在比较图形界面(GUI)与程序化命令界面(CLI)时，混淆了交互模态与任务、初始状态、验证器及允许操作的差异，缺乏公平、可控的执行层对比基准。
AI.method: 构建了包含440个桌面任务、覆盖18个应用和12个工作流类别的匹配执行层基准，为纯屏幕GUI智能体和基于技能的CLI智能体提供完全相同的目标、状态和最终状态验证器，同时限制其仅使用模态原生的操作；并引入验证器引导的技能增强方法以提升CLI智能体的技能覆盖。
AI.result: 最强GUI智能体完整通过率为59.1%，超过原始最强CLI智能体的48.2%；通过验证器引导的技能增强后，CLI成功率提升至69.3%，表明CLI的缺陷主要源于技能覆盖不足而非模型能力本身。
AI.conclusion: GUI智能体的瓶颈在于长程工作流中的可靠接地交互，CLI智能体的瓶颈在于技能接口的覆盖范围与可扩展性；两类模态暴露了根本不同的执行瓶颈，对智能体系统设计具有重要指导意义。

title: EgoSAT: A Comprehensive Benchmark of Egocentric Streaming Interaction Understanding
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2026. Project page: https://leiyj23.github.io/EgoSAT/
summary: We introduce EgoSAT, the first comprehensive benchmark for egocentric video reasoning in streaming settings, designed to evaluate the capabilities of modern vision-language models (VLMs). The benchmark targets streaming interaction understanding, where video frames arrive sequentially and models must continuously interpret evolving visual context. EgoSAT unifies several previously distinct tasks within a single streaming framework. In this formulation, queries about completed events correspond to retrospective reasoning, queries about ongoing activities require online understanding, and queries about future actions involve prospective anticipation. This unified setting requires models to reason about the past, present, and future while operating under the constraint that only previously observed frames are available. EgoSAT contains 1,997 unique videos spanning 165 hours of egocentric footage and around 4,800 high-quality question-answer pairs, carefully designed to probe reasoning across varying temporal contexts. Using this benchmark, we evaluate a diverse set of both open-weight and closed-weight VLMs, providing a systematic assessment of their ability for streaming interaction understanding. By distinguishing answerability and conducting diagnostics on confidence of models, we find existing models not only struggle with prospective and retrospective modeling, but also exhibit severe mis-calibration: confidence often fails to track inherent answerability, leading to dangerous "confidently wrong" behaviors. Project page: https://leiyj23.github.io/EgoSAT/

AI.tldr: EgoSAT is a comprehensive benchmark for egocentric video reasoning in streaming settings, unifying retrospective, online, and prospective reasoning tasks. Evaluations reveal that current VLMs struggle with temporal reasoning and exhibit severe confidence miscalibration, often producing confidently wrong answers.
AI.motivation: 现有视频推理基准大多针对离线剪辑视频设计，缺乏对流式交互场景（帧序列到达、模型需持续理解不断演化的视觉上下文）的评估能力，且未统一覆盖事后回顾、在线理解和未来预测三类时间维度的推理任务。
AI.method: EgoSAT将此前分散的多个任务统一到一个流式推理框架中，将已完成事件查询、进行中活动查询和未来动作查询分别对应回顾推理、在线理解和前瞻预测，要求模型仅基于已观测到的帧进行推理。基准包含1,997段共165小时的以自我为中心的视频及约4,800个高质量问答对，系统评估了多种开源和闭源视觉语言模型（VLM）。
AI.result: 现有VLM在前瞻预测和回顾推理任务上表现困难，且存在严重的置信度校准问题：模型置信度往往无法反映真实的可回答性，导致频繁出现“自信错误”的行为。
AI.conclusion: 流式视频推理对现有VLM构成显著挑战，尤其是在时间建模和置信度校准方面，提示未来研究需要关注模型对时间上下文的理解能力以及可靠的不确定性估计。

title: LLMs Prompted for Legal Context Object More: Overrefusal from Small On-Premises LLMs in Criminal Legal Context
summary:
While the validity of LLMs' use in the legal context remains subject to ethical and legal debate, legal professionals are already experimenting with personal LLMs, if only for translation and reformulation. However, even such a seemingly innocuous use can introduce biases through case processing speed if LLM assistants selectively refuse assistance on certain topics. To better anticipate such biases, we investigate several modern small LLMs that are most likely to be used as on-device assistants, to assess the impact of overrefusal on legal prompts.
  Surprisingly, we find that authority-style prefixes (``you are acting as an assistant of the national supreme court'', ``[...] defense lawyer'') systematically increase refusal rates by 2--20x over the no-prefix baseline, while a known role-play jailbreak prefix shows mixed effects, sharply increasing refusals in some models and barely shifting them in others. The finding suggests that small on-prem deployable LLMs are unstable under contextual framings that a real institutional user might naturally introduce, and further investigation is essential to minimize opportunities for bias.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了小型本地部署LLM在法律场景下的过度拒绝行为，发现权威性角色前缀（如“你正在扮演国家最高法院助手”）会使拒绝率较无前缀基线提升2–20倍，而角色扮演越狱前缀效果不一，揭示了小型LLM在上下文框架下存在不稳定性，可能引入处理速度偏差。
AI.motivation: 尽管LLM在法律领域的伦理与法律有效性仍存争议，法律从业者已开始尝试使用个人LLM进行翻译和改写等任务，然而即便是这类看似无害的使用，也可能因LLM助手选择性拒绝某些主题而产生案件处理速度偏差；为提前预测此类偏差，本文旨在评估小型LLM在法律提示下的过度拒绝（overrefusal）影响。
AI.method: 本文选取了几种适合设备端部署的现代小型LLM作为研究对象，通过在法律提示中添加不同的角色前缀（如“你正在扮演国家最高法院助手”、“辩护律师”等权威性前缀，以及已知的角色扮演越狱前缀），系统比较前缀条件下与无前缀基线下的拒绝率变化。
AI.result: 实验发现，权威性角色前缀系统性地将拒绝率提升至无前缀基线的2–20倍；而已知的角色扮演越狱前缀效果不统一，在某些模型中显著提高拒绝率，在其他模型中则几乎不改变拒绝率。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，小型本地可部署LLM在真实机构用户可能自然引入的上下文框架下表现出不稳定性，这种不稳定性可能导致偏见引入，因此需要进一步研究以最小化偏差机会。

title: P-MTP: Efficient Document Parsing via Multi-Token Prediction with Progressive Depth Scaling
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have revolutionized document parsing by enabling end-to-end mapping from images to structured text, imposing a significant latency bottleneck, particularly for token-dense documents. While Multi-Token Prediction (MTP) has emerged as a promising approach for accelerating inference, its potential is constrained by optimization instability when scaling to deeper look-ahead depth. In this paper, we propose \textbf{P-MTP}, a framework that leverages \textbf{Progressive Multi-Token Prediction} with a lightweight MTP module to scale the look-ahead depth for high-throughput document parsing. Specifically, we introduce Progressive Curriculum Loss that adaptively re-weights different look-ahead depths using cumulative path reliability and retrospective target consistency. By effectively suppressing gradient noise in long-range predictions, P-MTP, facilitates an automated easy-to-hard optimization transition, enabling the model to master increasingly distant look-ahead depths. Furthermore, we propose Confidence-Gated Dynamic Drafting to maximize the effective look-ahead depth and acceptance rate by adaptively calibrating speculative length during inference, thereby minimizing computational waste and further pushing the boundaries of inference speedup. Experimental results across multiple benchmarks and architectures demonstrate that P-MTP, achieves up to a $5\times$ speedup with negligible loss in accuracy, providing the first successful validation of extensive look-ahead MTP in the document parsing domain.

AI.tldr: 提出P-MTP框架，通过渐进式多令牌预测（Progressive Multi-Token Prediction）与轻量MTP模块，结合渐进式课程损失和置信门控动态草稿机制，在文档解析领域实现高达5倍推理加速且精度几乎无损。
AI.motivation: 视觉语言模型（VLM）在文档解析中面临严重的延迟瓶颈，尤其是令牌密集型文档的推理效率低下。多令牌预测（MTP）虽能加速推理，但在扩展更深预测深度时存在优化不稳定问题，限制了其在文档解析领域的实际应用。
AI.method: P-MTP框架包含两个核心机制：一是渐进式课程损失（Progressive Curriculum Loss），通过累积路径可靠性和回顾目标一致性自适应地重加权不同look-ahead深度，抑制长程预测中的梯度噪声，实现从易到难的自动优化过渡；二是置信门控动态草稿（Confidence-Gated Dynamic Drafting），在推理阶段根据模型置信度自适应校准推测长度，最大化有效look-ahead深度和接受率，减少计算浪费。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试和不同架构上的实验结果表明，P-MTP在文档解析任务中实现了高达5倍的推理加速，同时精度损失可以忽略不计，首次成功验证了在文档解析领域进行深度多令牌预测的有效性。
AI.conclusion: P-MTP通过渐进式训练策略和自适应推理机制有效解决了MTP在深look-ahead下的优化不稳定问题，为高吞吐文档解析提供了可行的加速方案，表明深度多令牌预测在实际场景中具有良好的应用前景。

title: Lite Any Stereo V2: Faster and Stronger Efficient Zero-Shot Stereo Matching
summary: Recent advances in stereo matching have achieved remarkable accuracy, but often rely on large models, heavy computation, or additional foundation-model priors, making them difficult to deploy on resource-constrained platforms. In contrast, efficient stereo models offer faster inference but are commonly considered less capable of strong zero-shot generalization. In this paper, we challenge this assumption by introducing Lite Any Stereo V2 (LAS2), an ultra-fast model series designed for efficient zero-shot stereo matching. LAS2 is developed from both architecture and training perspectives. Architecturally, we revisit efficient stereo design under practical deployment settings and propose a 2D-only cost aggregation framework, optimized for real inference latency rather than theoretical MACs alone. For training, we develop a three-stage strategy that combines synthetic supervision, self-distillation, and real-world knowledge distillation. To improve the reliability of real-world pseudo supervision, we further introduce pseudo-label filtering and an error-clamping operation, enabling smoother synthetic-to-real transfer. We instantiate LAS2 as a family of models, including feed-forward variants for different efficiency budgets and an iterative variant for higher accuracy. Extensive experiments show that LAS2 achieves state-of-the-art accuracy among efficient stereo methods while maintaining significantly lower latency. Specifically, LAS2-H achieves stronger overall zero-shot performance than the iterative method Fast-FoundationStereo, with 1.8x and 2.7x faster inference on H200 and Orin, respectively. The project page, demos, and code are available at https://tomtomtommi.github.io/LiteAnyStereoV2/.

AI.tldr: Lite Any Stereo V2 (LAS2) 提出了一种超轻量的2D-only成本聚合框架，结合三阶段训练策略（合成监督、自蒸馏和真实知识蒸馏）及伪标签过滤与误差裁剪操作，在保持极低推理延迟的同时实现了高效零样本立体匹配领域的最优精度。
AI.motivation: 现有高精度立体匹配方法依赖大模型、高计算量或基础模型先验，难以部署在资源受限平台；而高效立体模型虽然推理快但通常被认为零样本泛化能力弱。本文旨在挑战这一假设，设计一个同时具备强零样本泛化能力和超低延时的立体匹配模型。
AI.method: 从架构上，LAS2重新审视高效立体匹配设计，提出仅基于2D卷积的成本聚合框架，优化实际推理延迟而非理论MACs。从训练上，提出三阶段策略：合成数据监督预训练、自蒸馏、真实知识蒸馏，并引入伪标签过滤与误差裁剪操作以改善合成到真实的迁移可靠性。模型族包括面向不同效率预算的前馈变体和高精度的迭代变体。
AI.result: LAS2在高效立体方法中实现了最优精度且显著低于竞品的延迟。LAS2-H在零样本性能上超越迭代方法Fast-FoundationStereo，同时在H200和Orin上分别实现1.8倍和2.7倍的推理加速。
AI.conclusion: 本文表明，通过针对性架构优化和精心设计的训练策略，高效模型同样能实现强零样本泛化能力，突破了以往认为高效立体模型泛化能力不足的假设，为资源受限平台上的立体匹配部署提供了实用方案。

title: ASALT: Adaptive State Alignment for Lateral Transfer in Multi-agent Reinforcement Learning
summary: Multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) addresses the problem of training multiple agents that pursue collaborative, competitive, or mixed objectives. Prior work has investigated transfer learning between source and target domains in MARL; however, the majority of existing approaches impose the constraint that the dimensionalities of the observation space and the global state space must be identical across domains. In this paper, we introduce a method that explicitly accommodates mismatched state-space dimensionalities between source and target domains. The proposed approach, ASALT, incorporates both observation-level and state-level adapters that map the target-domain observations and global states into a shared embedding space, thereby enabling more effective transfer of knowledge across both actors and critics. These adapters can generate embeddings that support efficient strategy transfer across heterogeneous domains. Experimental results on multiple configurations in standard benchmark environments demonstrate that ASALT surpasses existing baselines in terms of sample efficiency and global return in cooperative settings, but its effectiveness depends on the degree of mismatch between source and target domains. Furthermore, our findings indicate that ASALT mitigates negative transfer, which frequently constitutes a major obstacle when transferring policies between domains with differing observation and action spaces.

AI.tldr: ASALT提出了一种通过观测级和状态级适配器将源域与目标域的观测和全局状态映射到共享嵌入空间的方法，有效解决了多智能体强化学习中跨域状态空间维度不匹配的问题，在合作场景下显著提升了样本效率和全局回报，并缓解了负迁移。
AI.motivation: 现有MARL迁移学习方法通常要求源域与目标域的观测空间和全局状态空间维度完全相同，这一严格约束限制了迁移策略在异构环境中的适用性，亟需一种能够显式处理跨域状态空间维度不匹配的迁移方法。
AI.method: ASALT方法在观测层级和状态层级分别引入适配器模块，将目标域的观测和全局状态映射到与源域共享的嵌入空间中，使得actor和critic网络能够跨异构领域进行有效的知识迁移，从而支持策略在维度不匹配的域间迁移。
AI.result: 在标准基准环境的多项配置下，ASALT在合作场景中超越了现有基线方法，取得了更高的样本效率和全局回报，但其迁移效果受源域与目标域维度失配程度的影响；此外，ASALT有效缓解了跨域迁移中常见的负迁移问题。
AI.conclusion: 本研究揭示了显式维度适配机制在解决异构MARL迁移问题中的关键作用，表明基于共享嵌入空间的适配器设计能够有效克服状态空间维度差异带来的迁移障碍，并为未来在更广泛异构多智能体环境中的迁移学习研究提供了新的方向。

title: Advancing WordArt-Oriented Scene Text Recognition: Datasets and Methods
summary: WordArt (artistic text) features highly customized fonts, textures, and layouts, making WordArt-oriented scene TExt Recognition (WATER) substantially more challenging than general Scene Text Recognition (STR). Existing STR datasets and methods, typically built around regular scene text and fixed-template inputs, struggle to scale to WATER. Thus, we aim to advance this task from both data and model perspectives. On the data side, we construct a 2M synthetic dataset, WATER-S, with the scale improved by hundreds of times compared to existing artistic text data. WATER-S consists of two complementary subsets. One rendered by an upgraded rendering pipeline (SynthWordArt), which provides highly accurate and controllable synthetic WordArt data. The other is generated by combining Qwen3-VL for prompt mining and Z-Image for image synthesis, which improves the coverage of realistic and diverse data. On the model side, we propose WATERec. It adopts an visual encoder supporting arbitrary-shaped inputs and an autoregressive decoder to model complex layouts, structurally breaking the bottleneck of fixed-template STR on WordArt. Experiments show that this architecture outperforms prior STR methods, achieving state-of-the-art performance on irregular texts such as WordArt. Together with WATER-R, carefully reorganized from existing real STR data, our strong baseline with the new synthetic data and model design reaches 90.40% accuracy on WordArt-Bench, surpassing both general-purpose and OCR-specialized vision-language models by a large margin. Code and data are available at https://github.com/YesianRohn/WATER.

AI.tldr: 本文针对WordArt（艺术字）场景文本识别（WATER）任务，从数据和模型两方面提出解决方案：构建了百万级合成数据集WATER-S（含SynthWordArt渲染子集和VLMs驱动的多样化子集），并设计了支持任意形状输入和自回归解码的WATERec模型，在WordArt-Bench上达到90.40%准确率，大幅超越现有STR方法和视觉语言模型。
AI.motivation: 现有场景文本识别（STR）数据集和方法主要针对规则文本和固定模板输入设计，无法有效扩展到高度定制化、字体/纹理/布局多样化的WordArt（艺术字）识别任务，且现有艺术字数据规模极小（仅为常规STR数据的极小比例），严重制约了该方向的研究进展。
AI.method: 在数据方面，构建了包含200万样本的WATER-S合成数据集，规模较现有艺术文本数据提升数百倍；其中SynthWordArt子集通过升级的渲染管线生成高精度可控数据，另一子集结合Qwen3-VL进行提示挖掘与Z-Image进行图像合成以提升真实性和多样性。在模型方面，提出WATERec，采用支持任意形状输入的视觉编码器与自回归解码器架构，从结构上突破固定模板STR在WordArt上的性能瓶颈。
AI.result: WATERec结合WATER-S合成数据与WATER-R真实数据，在WordArt-Bench上达到90.40%准确率，大幅超越通用视觉语言模型和OCR专用视觉语言模型，在各类不规则文本（尤其是艺术字）识别上取得最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过大规模高质量合成数据与适配不规则文本的模型架构设计，可以系统性解决WordArt识别难题，打破传统STR方法在艺术字场景上的性能天花板；合成数据策略（渲染管线+大模型驱动生成）和灵活架构对未来OCR研究具有重要借鉴意义。

title: ScaleToT: Generalizing Structured LLM Reasoning for Billion-Scale Low-Activity User Modeling
summary: Accurate user modeling often depends on rich interaction histories, which are unavailable for billions of low-activity users. Large Language Models (LLMs) can infer latent user states from static profiles, but this reasoning becomes unreliable when profiles are sparse, and applying an LLM to billions of users is prohibitively expensive. We present ScaleToT, which learns structured reasoning from a small LLM-processed subset and extends it to the broader low-activity user population. To improve reasoning reliability, ScaleToT constructs typed user-state chains with a bounded entropy-guided Tree-of-Thought (ToT) refinement procedure. To make this structured reasoning usable from sparse profiles, the teacher-curated chains are used to train a student model on static profiles through supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and Outcome-Driven Segment-Aware Implicit Reward Policy Optimization (OSIPO). ScaleToT then transfers the student's reasoning representations to a lightweight profile encoder, providing shared reasoning signals for the remaining users without LLM inference. We evaluate ScaleToT on lifetime value (LTV) prediction in a billion-scale advertising deployment. A randomized online A/B test increased LT30 by 6.738\%, while offline reasoning covered only 7.32\% of the potential population, greatly reducing compute cost compared with full-population reasoning.

AI.tldr: ScaleToT 提出利用小规模 LLM 处理的结构化推理链通过知识蒸馏和轻量级编码器迁移至全体低活跃用户，在十亿级广告 LTV 预测场景中以仅覆盖 7.32% 用户的推理开销实现 LT30 提升 6.738%。
AI.motivation: 现有用户建模依赖丰富的交互历史，但数十亿低活跃用户的稀疏画像导致传统 LLM 推理成本过高且不可靠，亟需一种能从少量 LLM 处理样本中学习并扩展到全体低活跃用户群体的高效结构化推理方法。
AI.method: ScaleToT 首先利用有界熵引导的思维树（ToT）对少量用户进行精细化结构化推理，生成带类型的用户状态链；然后通过监督微调（SFT）和基于结果的段感知隐式奖励策略优化（OSIPO）训练学生模型从静态画像中复现该推理；最后将学生模型的推理表示迁移至轻量级画像编码器，为其余用户提供共享推理信号而无需 LLM 推理。
AI.result: 在十亿级广告部署的在线 A/B 测试中，ScaleToT 使 LT30 提升 6.738%，而离线推理仅覆盖 7.32% 的潜在用户群体，相比于全量推理大幅降低了计算成本。
AI.conclusion: ScaleToT 验证了通过少量 LLM 推理链的知识蒸馏可有效扩展结构化推理至全体低活跃用户，在广告 LTV 预测中显著提升效果并降低计算开销，为大规模稀疏用户建模提供了可行路径。

title: VisCritic: Visual State Comparison as Process Reward for GUI Agents
comment: 17 pages, 4 figures; ECCV 2026 submission; supplementary material uploaded as ancillary file
summary: GUI agents powered by vision-language models show strong potential for automating digital tasks, yet frequently fail in long-horizon scenarios due to the absence of step-level verification. Existing process reward models verify actions through textual reasoning alone, missing the visual nature of GUI state changes. We introduce VisCritic, a visual process reward framework that verifies agent actions by directly comparing pre-action and post-action screenshots in visual feature space. VisCritic employs a Siamese vision transformer to extract change-aware representations, coupled with an Action-Aware Critic Head that jointly evaluates action success, task progress, and error type. A critic-training data construction pipeline generates weakly supervised samples from existing trajectories without additional human labels for critic training. Experiments and offline analyses across five benchmarks demonstrate that VisCritic serves as a plug-and-play enhancement for diverse GUI agents, generally improving benchmark metrics while providing visual diagnostic cues.

AI.tldr: VisCritic是一种视觉过程奖励框架，通过比较操作前后的截图，利用Siamese视觉Transformer提取变化感知表示，为GUI智能体提供步骤级视觉验证，无需额外人工标注即可提升智能体在长程任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有的GUI智能体在长程任务中频繁失败，主要原因在于缺乏步骤级的验证机制；而现有的过程奖励模型仅通过文本推理进行动作验证，忽略了GUI状态变化的视觉本质，无法准确捕捉屏幕状态的实际变化。
AI.method: VisCritic采用Siamese视觉Transformer架构，在视觉特征空间中直接比较操作前后的截图以提取变化感知表示，并搭配一个Action-Aware Critic Head，该头部联合评估动作成功性、任务进度和错误类型；此外，还设计了一个批评者训练数据构建管线，从现有轨迹中生成弱监督样本，无需额外人工标注即可完成批评者训练。
AI.result: 在五个基准测试上的实验和离线分析表明，VisCritic能够作为即插即用的增强模块适配多种GUI智能体，在整体上提升基准指标的性能，同时提供可视化的诊断线索。
AI.conclusion: VisCritic通过引入视觉特征空间中的步骤级验证，有效弥补了现有过程奖励模型忽视视觉状态变化的缺陷，为提升GUI智能体在长程任务中的可靠性提供了一种无需额外人工标注的通用增强方案，并具备可视化诊断能力。

title: SAFARI: Scaling Long Horizon Agentic Fault Attribution via Active Investigation
comment: Published at the Second Workshop on Agents in the Wild: Safety, Security, and Beyond (AIWILD) at ICML 2026
summary: As autonomous agents tackle increasingly complex multi-step, multi-agent tasks, their execution trajectories have scaled beyond the constraints of even the largest context windows. Current methods for effectively diagnosing agent failures load the full trajectory into an LLM's context window, which suffers from attention dilution and fails when agentic traces inevitably exceed context limits. To address this, we introduce SAFARI (Scaling long-horizon Agentic Fault AttRibution via active Investigation), a framework that replaces linear context loading with a tool-augmented diagnostic loop. By equipping LLMs with a specialized toolbox to read and search trajectory segments alongside a persistent Short-Term Memory (STM) for cross-turn reasoning, SAFARI effectively decouples diagnostic accuracy from architectural context limits. Our experiments demonstrate that SAFARI outperforms state-of-the-art results by 20% on the Who&When dataset within a 1M token budget, and by 19% on TRAIL GAIA subset on a 25K token budget. Most significantly, SAFARI maintains a 0.58 precision even when the target fault resides 5x beyond the model's native context window, a scenario where traditional evaluators fail entirely.

AI.tldr: SAFARI是一个用工具增强的主动诊断框架，通过将线性上下文加载替换为带专用工具箱和短期记忆的诊断循环，将长程智能体故障归因能力从模型固有上下文窗口限制中解耦出来，在多个基准上取得优于现有方法20%以上的表现，并在超出上下文窗口5倍的情况下仍保持0.58的精度。
AI.motivation: 随着多步骤、多智能体任务日趋复杂，执行轨迹长度已超出最大上下文窗口的限制；现有方法通过将完整轨迹加载到大语言模型的上下文窗口中进行故障诊断，不仅遭受注意力稀释问题，更在轨迹超出上下文限制时完全失效。
AI.method: SAFARI提出一种工具增强的诊断循环，用带专用工具箱读取和搜索轨迹片段的方式替代线性上下文加载，并结合用于跨轮推理的短期记忆模块，从而将诊断准确度与架构上下文大小限制解耦。
AI.result: 在Who&When数据集上以1M token预算超出当前最优方法20%，在TRAIL GAIA子集上以25K token预算超出19%；当目标故障位于模型原生上下文窗口5倍之外时，SAFARI仍保持0.58的精度，而传统评估器完全失效。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，通过主动搜索和工具增强的诊断范式可以有效突破大语言模型的上下文窗口瓶颈，为长程智能体系统的故障归因提供了一条不依赖扩大上下文的可行路径。

title: Are Text-to-Image Models Inductivist Turkeys? A Counterfactual Benchmark for Causal Reasoning
summary: Text-to-image (T2I) generation models have achieved remarkable progress in producing visually realistic images from natural language prompts. Yet it remains unclear whether their success reflects genuine causal understanding or sophisticated pattern matching over visual-textual correlations. Inspired by Russell's inductivist turkey, we introduce Counterfactual-World (CF-World), a counterfactual benchmark designed to investigate whether text-to-image models can generate images under rules that systematically contradict real-world priors. CF-World organizes each scenario into three progressive levels: factual generation under ordinary world knowledge, explicit counterfactual generation with direct visual instructions, and implicit counterfactual generation requiring causal deduction from altered rules. We evaluate both open-source and closed-source T2I models using a Vision Language Model (VLM)-based evaluator (CF-Eval). Furthermore, we introduce two metrics: Prior Resistance Rate (PRR), which measures a model's ability to overcome entrenched real-world priors, and Reasoning Retention Rate (RRR), which assesses whether models can maintain reasoning-dependent counterfactual generation without explicit visual cues. Experiments show that all models exhibit sharp degradation from factual to counterfactual settings. Further analyses suggest that these failures arise because current T2I models encode world knowledge and visual appearances as tightly coupled patterns. Consequently, their heavy reliance on frequent visual co-occurrences within the training data forces them to default to familiar commonsense priors when tasked with rendering counterfactual worlds.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Counterfactual-World (CF-World)基准，通过构造违背真实世界先验的反事实场景，系统评估文本到图像生成模型的因果理解能力，发现所有模型在反事实设定下性能急剧下降，根源在于模型将世界知识与视觉外观编码为紧密耦合的模式，过度依赖训练数据中的高频视觉共现。
AI.motivation: 当前文本到图像生成模型虽能生成逼真图像，但其成功究竟源于真正的因果理解还是复杂的模式匹配尚不明确，现有评估缺乏对模型因果推理能力的系统性检验，尤其是当生成规则与真实世界先验相悖时的表现。
AI.method: 作者提出Counterfactual-World (CF-World)基准，将每个场景组织为三个递进层次：事实生成（基于普通世界知识）、显式反事实生成（含直接视觉指令）和隐式反事实生成（需从改变的规则中进行因果推理）。评估采用基于视觉语言模型(VLM)的CF-Eval，并引入两个新指标：先验抵抗率(PRR)衡量模型克服固有先验的能力，推理保持率(RRR)评估模型在无显式视觉线索时保持反事实生成的能力。
AI.result: 实验表明，所有开源和闭源T2I模型从事实到反事实设定均表现出显著性能下降；进一步分析揭示，当前T2I模型将世界知识与视觉外观编码为紧密耦合的模式，在处理反事实世界时因过度依赖训练数据中的高频视觉共现而退回到熟悉的常识先验。
AI.conclusion: 当前文本到图像生成模型缺乏真正的因果理解能力，其成功主要源于对视觉-文本相关性的复杂模式匹配；研究揭示了模型在反事实推理上的根本局限性，为未来提升模型的因果推理和泛化能力指明了方向。

title: LaGO: Latent Action Guidance for Online Reinforcement Learning
comment: 9 pages, 2 figures. Accepted at the ICML 2026 Workshop on Large Language Models for Planning (LM4Plan)
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have shown strong potential for planning and sequential decision-making, but prior work often relies on using them as direct controllers, which requires precise action generation and can be unreliable in practice. This paper proposes Latent Action Guidance for Online Reinforcement Learning (LaGO), a framework that uses a pretrained LLM as a latent action prior to softly guide online policy optimization, rather than treating the LLM as an explicit planner or controller. Experiments on both a discrete-control benchmark, CLEVR-Robot, and a continuous-control benchmark, Meta-World, demonstrate that LaGO consistently improves both reward and success rate over Vanilla PPO. In particular, LaGO increases the average success rate from 15.1% to 27.2% on CLEVR-Robot and from 2.7% to 15.2% on Meta-World. Our analysis further shows that stronger pretrained LLMs provide more effective guidance, suggesting that LLM knowledge can improve planning and online decision-making.

AI.tldr: LaGO 提出将预训练 LLM 作为潜在动作先验，在在线强化学习中软性地引导策略优化，而非将其用作显式控制器，在 CLEVR-Robot 和 Meta-World 两个基准上显著提升了奖励和成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常将大语言模型用作直接控制器或显式规划器，这要求模型输出精确的动作，在实际应用中可靠性不足；因此需要一种更稳健的方式利用 LLM 的知识来辅助在线决策与策略优化。
AI.method: LaGO 框架利用预训练 LLM 作为潜在动作先验，在在线强化学习（PPO）过程中以软性引导方式影响策略优化方向，而非直接生成或控制动作，从而兼顾 LLM 的语义理解能力与 RL 的环境交互适应性。
AI.result: 在离散控制基准 CLEVR-Robot 上，LaGO 将平均成功率从 15.1% 提升至 27.2%；在连续控制基准 Meta-World 上，从 2.7% 提升至 15.2%。实验同时表明，更强的预训练 LLM 能提供更有效的引导。
AI.conclusion: LLM 的语义知识可以通过潜在动作先验的方式有效提升在线强化学习的规划与决策能力，且引导效果与 LLM 本身的能力正相关，为结合先验知识与强化学习提供了新的思路。

title: Heterogeneous Knowledge Distillation via Geometry Decoupling and Momentum-Aware Gradient Regulation
summary: Heterogeneous Knowledge Distillation (HKD) aims to transfer knowledge across varying architectures (e.g., from Transformer to CNN) but inherently suffers from severe training instability. We reveal that this instability stems from two highly coupled challenges: massive feature norm discrepancies that cause optimization drag, and severe gradient conflicts between the primary and distillation objectives arising from distinct inductive biases. To achieve stable distillation, we propose SPOFA, a framework built upon a novel Feature and Gradient Dual Stabilization mechanism. Specifically, at the feature level, we introduce a LayerNorm-based decoupling projector that explicitly decouples feature magnitude from direction, creating a bounded and stable space for semantic alignment. At the gradient level, we propose a momentum-driven Exponential Moving Average (MEMA) dynamic scaler. By establishing a robust historical baseline of the optimization trajectory, MEMA actively evaluates instantaneous gradient conflicts and adaptively penalizes harmful distillation signals, guaranteeing stable convergence. Importantly, SPOFA achieves this dual stabilization with an extremely lightweight parameter footprint. Extensive experiments on two mainstream benchmarks demonstrate that SPOFA achieves state-of-the-art accuracy, significantly outperforming computationally expensive methods while introducing only minimal computational overhead compared to standard baselines.

AI.tldr: SPOFA针对异构知识蒸馏（HKD）中特征范数差异和梯度冲突导致的训练不稳定问题，提出特征-梯度双稳定框架，通过LayerNorm解耦投影器对齐语义空间、MEMA动态缩放器自适应抑制有害梯度，以极轻量参数实现SOTA蒸馏精度。
AI.motivation: 异构知识蒸馏（HKD）在不同架构（如Transformer→CNN）间进行知识迁移时存在严重的训练不稳定性，现有方法未能有效解决由特征范数巨大差异引起的优化拖拽以及主任务与蒸馏目标之间因归纳偏置不同导致的梯度冲突这两个高度耦合的挑战。
AI.method: SPOFA提出了特征与梯度双稳定机制：在特征层面，设计基于LayerNorm的解耦投影器，将特征幅度与方向显式解耦，构建有界且稳定的语义对齐空间；在梯度层面，提出动量驱动的指数移动平均（MEMA）动态缩放器，通过建立优化轨迹的鲁棒历史基线来实时评估瞬时梯度冲突，并自适应地惩罚有害蒸馏信号，从而保证稳定收敛，且整体参数量极轻量。
AI.result: 在两个主流基准上的大量实验表明，SPOFA达到了最先进的精度，显著优于计算开销大的方法，同时相较于标准基线仅引入极小的额外计算开销。
AI.conclusion: SPOFA揭示了HKD不稳定的根本原因在于特征范数差异与梯度冲突的双重耦合，并证明了通过极轻量级的双稳定机制即可有效解决该问题，为异构知识蒸馏提供了一种兼顾稳定性和高效性的新范式。

title: Assessing Distribution Shift in Human Activity Recognition for Domain Generalization
summary: While the field of Human Activity Recognition (HAR) continues to draw interest from researchers and advance in important ways, some key challenges remain. One of the most difficult aspects of building HAR models that show good performance in real-world settings is dealing with data diversity from device and sensor heterogeneity, and contextual changes that are intrinsic to real-world applications. While data diversity in HAR has been well-acknowledged in the literature, there remains a gap in understanding the effect of various types of distribution shifts on HAR models and the domain generalization problem that arises. Towards that end, this paper systematically evaluates 4 different types of distribution shifts, including variations in device type, sensor placement, sampling rate, and user behavior. Quantifying their effects, we illustrate that diversity shifts predominantly define all types of shifts, indicating the existence of unique features that are not shared across different domains. We then introduce a uniform HAR-based distribution shift benchmarks and conduct a comprehensive evaluation of up to 28 domain generalization methods. Our analysis exposes the limitations of current domain generalization algorithms in achieving model generalizability, marginally outperforming the empirical risk minimization baseline. This work represents the first systematic exploration of domain generalization and adaptation concerning specific distribution shifts in sensor-based HAR, offering an open-source benchmark platform and datasets to spur further research.

AI.tldr: 本文首次系统性地探索了传感器人体活动识别（HAR）中的领域泛化问题，针对四种分布偏移（设备类型、传感器位置、采样率、用户行为）构建了统一基准，评估了28种领域泛化方法，发现现有方法在泛化能力上仅略优于经验风险最小化基线。
AI.motivation: 人体活动识别（HAR）在实际应用中面临来自设备异构性、传感器类型差异和环境变化带来的数据多样性挑战，尽管分布偏移问题已被广泛认知，但已有研究缺乏对不同类型分布偏移如何影响HAR模型以及由此引发的领域泛化问题的系统性理解。
AI.method: 本文系统性地评估了四种类型的分布偏移：设备类型、传感器放置位置、采样率和用户行为；量化了各类偏移的影响，发现多样性偏移主导了所有偏移类型，表明不同领域间存在大量不共享的独有特征；进而构建了统一的HAR分布偏移基准，并对28种领域泛化方法进行了全面评估。
AI.result: 实验表明，当前领域泛化算法在实现模型泛化能力上存在明显局限，其性能仅勉强优于经验风险最小化（ERM）基线方法；多样性偏移在所有偏移类型中占据主导地位，说明不同域间的特征共享程度较低。
AI.conclusion: 本研究首次针对传感器HAR中特定分布偏移下的领域泛化与适应问题进行了系统探索，揭示了现有领域泛化方法在HAR任务中的不足，并提供了开源基准平台和数据集以促进后续研究。

title: Quantum CT via Dynamic Interval Encoding and Prior-Balanced QUBO Reconstruction
summary: Quadratic unconstrained binary optimization (QUBO)-based quantum computed tomography (CT) casts reconstruction as a binary quadratic problem for quantum annealing and hybrid quantum--classical solvers. For grayscale CT, however, image encoding is constrained by the binary-variable budget: fixed global bit-plane encodings increase QUBO size and coupling complexity as gray-level precision improves, whereas low-bit encodings introduce quantization error. We propose a QUBO-based grayscale CT reconstruction framework that combines dynamic interval encoding with prior-balanced optimization. Each refinement round encodes active pixels only within local gray-level intervals around the current estimate, and a boundary-hit-guided update rule adaptively switches between search expansion and local refinement. To improve optimization stability, the method balances projection-domain data consistency and an edge-preserving quadratic prior before forming the final QUBO. Sparse-view and limited-angle fan-beam CT experiments show that the proposed method recovers structures and gray-level distributions more faithfully than the evaluated analytic, iterative, variational, and representation-based baselines. Expressivity analysis and ablation studies further indicate that the improvement mainly arises from effective gray-level representation through dynamic local encoding and more stable data-fidelity--prior coupling. Experiments on the D-Wave hybrid binary quadratic model (BQM) solver further demonstrate that the formulation is executable on a hardware-backed hybrid quantum--classical backend.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于动态区间编码与先验平衡优化的QUBO灰度CT重建框架，通过逐轮局部编码和边界命中自适应更新策略，在稀疏视角与有限角度扇形束CT实验中重建质量优于多种基线方法，并在D-Wave混合量子后端上验证了可行性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于QUBO的量子CT重建方法在灰度图像编码上受限于二进制变量预算：固定全局位平面编码随灰度精度提升导致QUBO规模与耦合复杂度急剧增加，而低位编码则引入量化误差，限制了量子计算方法在灰度CT重建中的实用性和重建质量。
AI.method: 提出一种结合动态区间编码与先验平衡优化的QUBO灰度CT重建框架，每轮优化仅对当前估计值附近局部灰度区间内的活跃像素进行编码，并通过边界命中引导的更新规则自适应地在搜索扩展与局部细化之间切换；为提升优化稳定性，在形成最终QUBO前平衡了投影域数据一致性与边缘保持二次先验。
AI.result: 在稀疏视角和有限角度扇形束CT实验中，所提方法在结构恢复和灰度分布保真度上优于评估的分析类、迭代类、变分类及表示类基线方法；表达性分析与消融实验表明，性能提升主要归因于动态局部编码带来的有效灰度表示以及更稳定的数据保真度-先验耦合；D-Wave混合BQM求解器上的实验验证了该方法可在硬件支持的混合量子-经典后端上运行。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了动态局部编码与先验平衡优化可有效克服QUBO框架下灰度CT的二进制变量预算瓶颈，为量子计算在医学成像中的实际应用提供了可行的技术路径，同时指明了混合量子-经典求解器在处理高精度重建问题上的潜力。

title: Grading the Grader: Lessons from Evaluating an Agentic Data Analysis System
summary: Agentic data analysis systems produce rich outputs, including code, numerical results, and verbal diagnostics. This makes them more challenging to evaluate than single-turn LLM responses. It is therefore necessary to distinguish genuine disagreement between an agent's output and a ground-truth answer from grading artifacts. We investigate how reliably automated graders assess such a system and what strategies improve grading quality by applying LAMBDA, a multi-agent data-analysis system, on 153 numerical QRData tasks from DSGym. We develop and evaluate a three-layer human-AI grading cascade: strict regex matching, LLM-based lenient grading, and snippet-based human inspection, which combines non-GenAI and GenAI strategies with different failure profiles. Both automated graders achieve 100% observed precision (0/70 false positives). The lenient grader's recall is 97% against human labels. A keyword-anchored extraction pipeline raises the strict grader's recall by 60 percentage points over a last-number heuristic; the lenient grader is architecturally parser-independent. An iterative nudge mechanism raises grading run success from 36% to 97% and lenient-pass rates from 16% to 46%; comparing nudging with and without original-question re-injection shows that re-injection offers no benefit, confirming the nudge as an answer template cue. We further observe in this case study that variable type is the task metadata field most consistently associated with grading pipeline dynamics and observed outcome grades.

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何可靠评估智能体数据分析系统，提出了三层人机分级审核机制（严格正则匹配、LLM宽松评分、片段人工审查），在DSGym的153个QRData任务上实现自动评分器100%精确率和97%宽松召回率，并通过迭代提示机制将评分成功率从36%提升至97%。
AI.motivation: 智能体数据分析系统产生的输出包括代码、数值结果和文本诊断，比单轮LLM响应更难评估，因此需要区分智能体输出与真实答案之间的真正不一致与评分人为偏差，以确保评估的可靠性。
AI.method: 提出了三层人机分级审核机制：严格正则匹配、基于LLM的宽松评分、基于片段的的人工审查，融合了非生成式AI与生成式AI策略；采用关键词锚定提取流水线提升严格评分器的召回率；设计了迭代提示机制（nudge）以提升评分运行成功率，并对比了有无原始问题注入的效果。
AI.result: 在DSGym的153个QRData任务上，两种自动评分器均达到100%观察精确率（0/70假阳性），宽松评分器召回率为97%；关键词锚定提取流水线使严格评分器召回率比最后数字启发式提升60个百分点；迭代提示机制将评分运行成功率从36%提升至97%，宽松通过率从16%提升至46%，且原始问题注入未带来额外收益；变量类型是与评分流水线动态和最终评分最一致相关的任务元数据字段。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明结合非生成式AI与生成式AI的分级审核策略能高精度可靠评估智能体数据分析系统，迭代提示机制显著提升评分稳定性且原始问题注入无益，变量类型是影响评分结果的关键元数据特征，为AI分析系统的评估方法论提供了重要参考。

title: PatternGSL: A Structured Specification Language for Template-Free and Simulation-Ready 3D Garments
summary: Reconstructing realistic, physically plausible garments from a single image remains a fundamental challenge. Template-free methods capture surface geometry but lack explicit sewing structure for simulation; while programmatic systems are simulation-ready but constrained by predefined templates. This reveals a fundamental representation gap between geometric reconstruction and structured garment construction. We present PatternGSL, a structured garment representation in the form of a template-free and learnable specification language that encodes complete sewing patterns, including panel boundaries, parameterized seams, and explicit stitch topology, in a compact and standardized form. PatternGSL preserves the physical rigor of pattern-based models while removing template dependence, elevating sewing structure as a first-class target for generative modeling. We further propose a vision-language framework that predicts PatternGSL specifications directly from a single image and decodes them into garments using lightweight deterministic validity handling, without optimization-based refinement or manual cleanup. In addition, we introduce PatternGSLData, the first large-scale image-to-GSL paired dataset comprising 300K samples with complete sewing pattern annotations, enabling supervised VLM training for structured garment reconstruction. Experiments demonstrate improved pattern accuracy over prior baselines, explicit sewing-structure recovery, reliable cloth simulation, and pattern-level editing through the same deterministic decoding pipeline. Code and data-processing scripts will be released at https://github.com/PatternGSL/PatternGSL.

AI.tldr: PatternGSL 提出了一种模板无关、可学习的结构化服装表示语言，并构建了视觉-语言框架，从单张图像直接预测完整缝纫图案，实现了无需优化后处理的物理仿真级服装重建。
AI.motivation: 现有单图服装重建方法存在根本性的表示鸿沟：无模板方法能捕捉表面几何但缺乏用于仿真的显式缝纫结构，而程序化系统虽具备仿真能力却受限于预定义模板，因此亟需一种既保留物理严谨性又消除模板依赖的结构化服装表示。
AI.method: PatternGSL 设计了一种模板无关、可学习的结构化规范语言，将完整缝纫图案（包括面板边界、参数化缝线、显式缝纫拓扑）编码为紧凑标准化形式；并构建视觉-语言框架，直接预测单张图像对应的 PatternGSL 规范，再通过轻量级确定性合法性处理解码为可仿真服装，无需优化迭代或人工清理；同时构建了首个大规模图像-GSL 配对数据集 PatternGSLData（30万样本），支持有监督视觉-语言模型训练。
AI.result: 实验表明，PatternGSL 在图案预测精度上优于先前基线方法，能够恢复显式缝纫结构，支持可靠的布料仿真，并通过同一确定性解码管线实现图案级别的编辑操作。
AI.conclusion: PatternGSL 将缝纫结构提升为生成建模的一等目标，弥合了几何重建与结构化服装构造之间的表示鸿沟，为可仿真、可编辑的单图服装重建提供了新范式；代码与数据处理脚本已开源。

title: World Models in Pieces: Structural Certification for General Agents
summary: In the big-world regime, agents cannot be universally capable and their ability is inevitably specialized across a world model in pieces. Consequently, standard uniform guarantees fail to distinguish between the understanding of critical bottlenecks and irrelevant failures. We first formalize this limitation by proving that general agents are not universal, rendering standard worst-case analysis uninformative. To overcome this, we introduce structural certification, a transition-local framework that maps bounded goal-conditioned performance to entry-wise guarantees on the agent's internal world model. Our main contribution is constructive. We provide algorithms that filter specific transitions using deep compositional goals and prove that a general agent on these goals has a structural world model with a $\mathcal{O}(1/n) + \mathcal{O}(δ)$ error bound. Conversely, this bound is tight in the small-$δ$ regime, whose existence is explicitly guaranteed by our certification. These results enable the certifiable deployment of general agents by localizing the specific transitions where long-horizon planning is reliable.

AI.tldr: 本文证明通用智能体在宏观世界（big-world regime）中无法具备普遍能力，并因此提出了结构认证（structural certification）框架，通过局部化转换验证为智能体的世界模型提供逐项保证，实现了在$\mathcal{O}(1/n) + \mathcal{O}(\delta)$误差界内的可认证部署。
AI.motivation: 在宏观世界（big-world regime）中，智能体无法具备普遍能力，其能力必然在碎片化的世界模型中被专业化，导致标准的均匀性保证无法区分对关键瓶颈的理解与无关紧要的失败。作者首先形式化了这一局限性，证明通用智能体并非普遍适用，使得标准的最坏情况分析失去意义，从而需要一种新的认证框架。
AI.method: 作者提出了结构认证（structural certification），一种过渡局部的框架，将有界的目标条件性能映射到智能体内部世界模型的逐项保证上。具体地，利用深度组合目标（deep compositional goals）设计算法来筛选特定的转换，并证明通用智能体在这些目标上具有结构性世界模型，其误差界为$\mathcal{O}(1/n) + \mathcal{O}(\delta)$。
AI.result: 理论结果表明，所提出的结构认证框架可为智能体的世界模型提供$\mathcal{O}(1/n) + \mathcal{O}(\delta)$误差界，且该界限在小$\delta$区域内是紧的，而该区域的存在性由认证过程明确保证。
AI.conclusion: 该研究通过局部化特定转换，使得长时域规划在这些转换上是可靠的，从而实现了通用智能体的可认证部署。这一框架为克服宏观世界中智能体能力专业化和认证困难提供了理论支撑与可行路径。

title: Jolia: Concept-Level Vision-Language Alignment for 3D CT Contrastive Learning
summary: Vision-language contrastive pretraining has become the dominant recipe for 3D medical foundation models, leveraging the large volumes of paired scans and reports produced in clinical practice. However, medical images usually span dozens of organs, and radiological reports are much longer than typical natural image captions and are composed of multiple structured sections. CLIP-style pretraining compresses this structure by encoding each modality into a single global token, at the risk of losing important details. We introduce ConQuer (Concept Queries), an image-text pretraining method that augments CLIP's global alignment with a set of localized alignments, one per concept. ConQuer splits the report into concept-specific sections and learns cross-attention queries that pool the matching image features without using any segmentation mask or spatial supervision. Contrastive learning is then applied independently for each concept. Concepts can be any unit of semantic localization; here, they are anatomical regions, one query per organ or gross body region. As a byproduct, each query learns attention maps focused on its concept, providing built-in spatial interpretability. We use ConQuer to train Jolia, a 3D CT foundation model on chest and abdominal CT. Jolia consistently outperforms a CLIP baseline on findings classification, report generation, and cross-center transfer, and sets a new state of the art across multiple public benchmarks. Jolia's weights will be released upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: ConQuer是一种改进的视觉-语言对比预训练方法，通过将放射学报告拆分为概念特定部分并为每个概念（如解剖区域）学习独立的交叉注意力查询，在保留全局对齐的同时实现细粒度的局部对齐，训练得到的3D CT基础模型Jolia在多个公共基准上取得了最先进的结果。
AI.motivation: 现有CLIP风格的视觉-语言对比预训练将整个医学图像和放射学报告分别编码为单个全局token，但医学影像通常覆盖数十个器官，而放射学报告比自然图像描述长得多且包含多个结构化章节，这种全局压缩方式会导致重要细节丢失，限制了模型在下游任务中的表现。
AI.method: ConQuer提出概念查询（Concept Queries）方法，将放射学报告拆分为概念特定的章节（如按器官或解剖区域划分），并为每个概念学习独立的交叉注意力查询以聚合对应的图像特征，无需使用任何分割掩码或空间监督；随后在每个概念上独立应用对比学习，同时每个查询会自发学习聚焦于其对应概念的空间注意力图，提供内建的空间可解释性。
AI.result: 使用ConQuer训练的3D CT基础模型Jolia（基于胸部和腹部CT）在发现分类、报告生成和跨中心迁移等多个任务上持续优于CLIP基线，并在多个公共基准上取得了新的最先进结果。
AI.conclusion: ConQuer通过引入概念级别的细粒度对齐，有效克服了CLIP全局压缩在医学视觉-语言预训练中的信息损失问题，同时提供了内建的空间可解释性；该方法有望成为医学影像基础模型预训练的新范式，模型权重将在录用后开源以促进复现和进一步研究。

title: Agentic Collaborative Cognition for Zero-Shot 3D Understanding
summary: Recent advancements have explored agentic zero-shot 3D understanding by reformulating it as video keyframe understanding with Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs). However, existing methods face an intrinsic bottleneck due to the finite observation perspectives inherent in videos and the implicit perception of 3D scenes. In this paper, we propose a collaborative multi-agent framework that assigns a Planning Agent to handle high-level viewpoint planning and supplement novel perspectives, and a Perception Agent to explicitly summarize the 3D scene into a structured holistic cognitive map. Specifically, Planning Agent first analyzes this cognitive map to determine query-relevant viewpoints and supplements missing critical perspectives to ensure comprehensive observation. Subsequently, Perception Agent documents object-level attributes from these views by assigning consistent instance identifiers across viewpoints, thereby integrating fragmented observations into the holistic cognitive map. In parallel, it provides feedback to filter out mismatched candidate objects and guide subsequent viewpoint planning. Through this closed-loop iterative process, two agents collaboratively figure out candidates until Perception Agent determines that sufficient information has been captured to complete the task. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on 6 benchmarks, with improvements of 11.1\% Acc@0.5 on ScanRefer, 14.6 BLEU-1 on 3D-assisted dialog, and 2.1 EM on SQA3D.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种协作式多智能体框架，通过规划智能体补充视角与感知智能体构建结构化3D认知地图的闭环迭代，解决了基于MLLM的零样本3D理解中视角有限和隐式感知的瓶颈，在六个基准上达到最优性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于多模态大语言模型的零样本3D理解方法将3D任务转化为视频关键帧理解，但受限于视频中有限的观测视角以及对3D场景的隐式感知，难以全面获取场景信息，构成了方法的内在瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出了一种协作式多智能体框架，包含规划智能体和感知智能体。规划智能体负责高层视角规划，根据认知图分析查询相关视角并补充缺失的关键视角；感知智能体通过跨视角分配一致的实例标识符，将碎片化观察显式总结为结构化的整体认知图，并反馈过滤不匹配的候选对象以引导后续视角规划。二者通过闭环迭代协同工作，直至感知智能体判定已获取足够信息完成任务。
AI.result: 在六个基准上实现了最先进性能：ScanRefer上Acc@0.5提升11.1%，3D辅助对话任务上BLEU-1提升14.6%，SQA3D上EM提升2.1%。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式构建结构化认知地图并结合多智能体协作的闭环迭代机制，有效突破了视角局限与隐式感知瓶颈，为基于MLLM的零样本3D理解提供了新的范式，验证了显式场景建模与智能体协同在3D视觉任务中的有效性。

title: Evaluating the Interpretability of Sparse Autoencoders with Concept Annotations
summary: Sparse autoencoders (SAEs) are increasingly used to extract interpretable concepts from vision and vision language models, yet existing evaluation methods largely rely on proxy metrics or qualitative inspection rather than measuring semantic correspondence. We present a human-grounded evaluation framework that quantifies alignment between SAE latents and human-annotated concepts, without requiring user studies, and validate this matching through targeted attribute perturbations. To enable this intervention-style evaluation in vision, we construct synCUB and synCOCO, synthetic benchmarks of paired images that differ in exactly one attribute. We introduce Fully-Binary Matching Pursuit (FBMP), a coalition-based matching procedure that supports many-to-one mappings between SAE latents and annotated concepts, and consistently outperforms one-to-one baselines. For functional validation, we propose a Targeted Attribute Perturbation Alignment Score (TAPAScore), which tests whether matched concepts respond selectively and in the expected direction under targeted image-level attribute perturbations. Under sanity checks, our matching and TAPAScore are the only evaluated metrics that reliably distinguish trained SAEs from untrained ones. Across SAEs trained on CLIP and DINOv2 embeddings, we find that increased overcompleteness can reduce perturbation alignment, indicating a reduction in interpretability. Our evaluation framework suggests that moderate dictionary sizes provide the best trade-off, yielding the most interpretable SAEs. Code and datasets are available at https://github.com/JonasKlotz/sae-concept-eval.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于人类标注概念的稀疏自编码器（SAE）可解释性评估框架，包含FBMP匹配算法和TAPAScore扰动验证指标，通过合成基准实验表明适度过完备性可提升可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有稀疏自编码器（SAE）在视觉和视觉语言模型中的应用日益广泛，但其评估方法多依赖代理指标或定性检验，缺乏对SAE潜在变量与人类标注概念之间语义对应关系的量化度量。
AI.method: 构建了synCUB和synCOCO两个合成基准数据集，其包含仅在单一属性上成对不同的图像；提出Fully-Binary Matching Pursuit (FBMP)协作匹配方法，支持SAE潜在变量与标注概念之间的多对多映射；设计Targeted Attribute Perturbation Alignment Score (TAPAScore)，通过目标属性扰动验证匹配概念的选择性响应。
AI.result: 在合理性检验中，仅FBMP匹配和TAPAScore能够可靠区分已训练与未训练的SAE；在CLIP和DINOv2的SAE实验中发现，过度过完备性会降低扰动对齐度，即降低可解释性；适度字典大小能够在可解释性上取得最佳权衡。
AI.conclusion: 基于人类标注概念的评估框架为SAE可解释性提供了更可靠的量化手段；适度过完备性比高过完备性更能产生可解释的SAE，该结论对视觉模型的可解释性研究具有重要指导意义。

title: SER: Learning to Ground Video Reasoning with Semantic Evidence Rewards
summary: Video MLLMs often struggle with fine-grained spatio-temporal reasoning, sometimes generating correct answers based on irrelevant frames or objects. Although outputting spatio-temporal evidence during reasoning is a promising direction, existing RL frameworks typically rely on geometry-only (IoU) rewards, which can be sensitive to boundary perturbations and overlook semantic alignment. To address this, we propose Semantic Evidence Reward (SER), which reformulates spatio-temporal evidence grounding as a constrained verification task. Instead of computing pixel-level overlap, SER uses a referee VLM as a local checker to evaluate model-generated evidence claims across two dimensions: relevance and localization quality, combined with a temporal penalty. This design reduces the reliance on dense box annotations and enables training directly on standard video QA data. On the V-STAR benchmark, SER achieves 49.6% mLGM, improving by 3.0 points over the strong evidence-grounded baseline Open-o3-Video, demonstrating its potential in enhancing both answer accuracy and evidence grounding.

AI.tldr: 提出语义证据奖励（SER），将时空证据定位重构为受约束的验证任务，利用裁判VLM评估模型生成证据的相关性和定位质量，在V-STAR基准上达到49.6% mLGM，比强基线Open-o3-Video提升3.0个百分点，同时提升答案准确性和证据定位能力。
AI.motivation: 视频多模态大语言模型在细粒度时空推理中常基于无关帧或物体生成正确答案，现有强化学习框架依赖基于IoU的几何奖励，对边界扰动敏感且忽视语义对齐，缺乏能够同时评估证据相关性与定位质量的奖励机制。
AI.method: 提出语义证据奖励（SER），将时空证据定位重新定义为受限验证任务，使用裁判VLM作为局部检查器，从相关性（relevance）和定位质量（localization quality）两个维度评估模型生成的证据，并引入时间惩罚项，无需稠密框标注即可直接在标准视频问答数据上训练。
AI.result: 在V-STAR基准上，SER达到49.6% mLGM，相比强证据定位基线Open-o3-Video提升3.0个百分点，证明了该方法在提升答案准确性和证据定位能力方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 基于语义对齐的奖励机制能够有效替代几何-only奖励，在减少对稠密标注依赖的同时提升视频MLLM的时空推理可解释性和准确性，为视频问答中的证据定位提供了一种更具泛化性的训练范式。

title: BioMedVR: Confusion-Aware Mixture-of-Prompt Experts for Biomedical Visual Reprogramming
comment: Accepted at ECCV 2026. 19 pages, 6 figures. Project page: https://jxliu-ai.github.io/biomedvr-page/
summary: Recent advances in vision-language models (VLMs) such as CLIP have demonstrated strong generalization across natural-image domains. However, adapting these models to biomedical imaging is non-trivial: full-model fine-tuning is computationally expensive, while medical data are often scarce and exhibit subtle, fine-grained inter-class differences, making parameter-efficient adaptation particularly critical. Visual Reprogramming (VR) offers a parameter-efficient alternative by injecting learnable perturbations into the input space, but existing VR approaches for VLMs mainly focus on positive class prompts and overlook confusing negatives, leading to miscalibrated predictions in fine-grained medical scenarios. We present BioMedVR, the first VR-based framework for biomedical imaging, enabling few-shot adaptation of pretrained VLMs through compact learnable VR modules. To mitigate class confusion, we introduce a Confusion Minimization Mechanism that leverages LLM-generated confusion-aware attributes together with a Confusion-Suppression Loss to explicitly reduce false-positive alignment. Moreover, the designed Mixture-of-Prompt Experts combines a positive expert for main-class discrimination and a negative expert for confusion suppression, balanced via adaptive gating. Extensive experiments on 18 datasets, including 11 biomedical datasets and 7 natural image benchmarks, demonstrate that BioMedVR achieves superior accuracy and generalization, effectively bridging VR and VLMs in biomedical domains.

AI.tldr: BioMedVR是首个将视觉重编程(VR)引入生物医学成像的框架，通过可学习的VR模块实现预训练视觉-语言模型(VLM)的少样本适配，并引入混淆最小化机制(结合LLM生成的混淆感知属性和混淆抑制损失)以及混合专家提示模块，在18个数据集上取得了优于现有方法的准确率和泛化性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型(如CLIP)在自然图像领域表现优异，但将其适配到生物医学成像面临挑战：全模型微调计算成本高昂，医学数据稀缺且类别间差异细微，而参数高效适配方法尤为重要；现有视觉重编程(VR)方法主要关注正类提示而忽略了混淆负类，导致细粒度医学场景中预测校准不佳。
AI.method: BioMedVR提出了一种基于VR的框架，通过紧凑的可学习VR模块实现预训练VLM在生物医学图像上的少样本适配；为缓解类别混淆，引入了混淆最小化机制，利用LLM生成混淆感知属性并结合混淆抑制损失来显式减少假阳性对齐；同时设计了混合专家提示模块，通过自适应门控平衡用于主类判别的正类专家和用于混淆抑制的负类专家。
AI.result: 在18个数据集(包括11个生物医学数据集和7个自然图像基准)上的大量实验表明，BioMedVR在准确率和泛化性能上均优于现有方法，有效弥合了VR与VLM在生物医学领域的鸿沟。
