AI.conclusion: BioMedVR首次证明了视觉重编程在生物医学图像领域的有效性，通过混淆最小化和混合专家机制显著提升了细粒度医学分类的精度与校准性，为参数高效地适配预训练VLM到医学应用提供了一种新的有效范式。

title: OrbitForge: Text-to-3D Scene Generation via Reconstruction-Anchored Video Synthesis
summary: Generic text-to-video models can be used as rich open-world scene priors. Despite the high quality of today's generated videos, they do not directly yield reliable 3D assets: camera motion is difficult to control, view coverage is partial, and frames often contain inconsistencies across time. We introduce OrbitForge, an adapter built from frozen video priors and per-prompt Gaussian Splatting reconstruction optimization that converts a single text-generated video into a canonical closed-orbit 3D Gaussian Splatting scene. We use 3D reconstruction as an anchor to improve the 3D consistency of the generated video. We obtain a preliminary 3D reconstruction from a first generated video via Deformable Gaussian Splatting with a robust MedianGS proxy. We render views from a prescribed orbit to detect missing viewpoints. OrbitForge uses the text-to-video model to complete only the missing views, and reconstructs the completed orbit into a final Gaussian Splatting scene. This design requires no task-specific video or multiview fine-tuning, avoids per-prompt score-distillation optimization, and does not progressively generate views one step at a time. We further argue that this setting demands coverage-aware evaluation: local smoothness alone rewards methods that never attempt a full orbit. On a frozen 300-prompt T3Bench-derived audit, OrbitForge reconstruction attains a 359.0-degree measured median span, raises originally unsupported-bin Q10 ImageReward from 8.07 to 16.36 relative to MedianGS-only reconstruction, while remaining competitive with VideoMV on the coverage-quality.

AI.tldr: OrbitForge 提出一种无需多视图微调或逐提示分数蒸馏优化的方法，利用冻结的文本生成视频先验与每提示三维高斯泼溅重建相结合，将单段文本生成视频转化为规范闭环轨道三维高斯泼溅场景，显著提升视图覆盖范围并保持重建质量。
AI.motivation: 现有的文本生成视频模型虽然能产生高质量开放世界视频，但直接用于三维资产生成时存在相机运动难以控制、视图覆盖不完整以及帧间时空不一致等关键问题，限制了其作为三维场景先验的可靠性。
AI.method: OrbitForge 采用冻结石文本生成视频先验与每提示三维高斯泼溅重建优化相结合的方式，首先通过可变形高斯泼溅（Deformable Gaussian Splatting）配合稳健的 MedianGS 代理从首段生成视频获取初步三维重建，然后从预设轨道渲染视图以检测缺失视角，仅对缺失视角调用文本生成视频模型完成补全，最终将补全后的轨道重建为完整的高斯泼溅场景，无需任务特定的视频或多视图微调，也不依赖渐进式逐视图生成。
AI.result: 在基于 T3Bench 导出的 300 个提示冻结审计集上，OrbitForge 重建达到 359.0 度的实测中位视角覆盖跨度，将原本不支持的 Q10 ImageReward 从 8.07 提升至 16.36（相较于仅 MedianGS 重建），同时在覆盖质量上与 VideoMV 保持竞争力。
AI.conclusion: OrbitForge 验证了以三维重建作为锚点可以有效提升生成视频的三维一致性，并指出在该设定下需要覆盖感知的评估指标，因为仅依赖局部平滑度会倾向于奖励那些从未尝试完整轨道的方法。

title: GeoT2V-Bench: Benchmarking 3D Consistency in Text-to-Video Models via 3D Reconstruction
summary: Camera-prompted text-to-video (T2V) models are increasingly used to synthesize virtual camera captures, such as orbiting objects or moving through static scenes. For these outputs, visual plausibility is insufficient: the generated frames should also provide coherent multi-view evidence for a single static 3D scene. We introduce GeoT2V-Bench, a reconstruction-based diagnostic benchmark for evaluating whether camera-prompted T2V clips can support explicit rigid 3D reconstruction. Our pipeline estimates per-frame camera intrinsics and poses with VGGT-style geometry estimation, fits DeformableGS, derives a static MedianGS proxy by temporal-median aggregation, and renders this proxy along the estimated camera path. Instead of producing a pass/fail label or a single scalar score, GeoT2V-Bench reports a continuous reconstruction profile covering apparent image motion, estimated trajectory behavior, MedianGS static rendering error, static-render flow agreement, and the gap between flexible and static fits. On a fair-format four-seed evaluation with 3,840 completed reconstructions from 12 open-weight model configurations and 80 GeCo-Eval static-scene prompts, we find that visible motion, static rendering error, flow agreement, and flexible-vs-static behavior often disagree. GeoT2V-Bench therefore captures complementary failure modes that emerge when generated videos are tested as global static-scene acquisitions.

AI.tldr: GeoT2V-Bench是一个基于重建的诊断基准，用于评估摄像提示文本生成视频（T2V）模型能否生成支持刚体3D重建的帧序列，揭示现有模型在静态场景一致性方面的互补性失效模式。
AI.motivation: 现有摄像提示T2V模型生成的视频在视觉上看似合理，但缺乏对帧序列是否支持一致静态3D场景重建的评估，传统评估指标无法捕捉全局场景一致性这一关键缺陷。
AI.method: GeoT2V-Bench采用VGGT风格的几何估计获取每帧相机内参和位姿，拟合可变形3D高斯表示（DeformableGS），通过时序中值聚合推导静态MedianGS代理，沿估计相机路径渲染该代理，最终输出包含表观图像运动、估计轨迹行为、MedianGS静态渲染误差、静态渲染光流一致性以及柔性拟合与静态拟合差距的连续重建剖面。
AI.result: 在公平格式的四种子评估下，对12种开源模型配置和80个GeCo-Eval静态场景提示完成3840次重建，发现表观运动、静态渲染误差、光流一致性和柔性与静态拟合行为之间经常出现不一致，表明GeoT2V-Bench捕获了互补的失效模式。
AI.conclusion: GeoT2V-Bench通过多维度重建剖面而非单一分数，揭示了生成视频作为全局静态场景采集时暴露的互补性失效模式，为改进T2V模型的3D一致性提供了诊断性评估工具。

title: Bridging the Manifold Gap: Riemannian Residual Line Search for One-Step Image Editing
summary: One-step diffusion editors are fast because they avoid inversion and iterative optimization, but a single transport update must be aggressive enough to realize the target prompt and conservative enough to preserve the source image--and no fixed update strength satisfies both demands across edit types. We treat this tension as a post-hoc candidate-selection problem on top of energy-field transport rather than as a new editing model. Our proposed method, Riemannian Residual Line Search, first builds a stronger edit by estimating the local time curvature of the prompt-delta field and projecting the corrected direction back onto the update norm of the original first-order energy-field transport estimation. It then forms a small residual path from the source image to this strong edit, retains the original first-order output as one candidate, and picks the final image by maximizing target-prompt CLIP alignment. On a 700-sample PIE-Bench++ evaluation across 10 edit type IDs, our method achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance among current one-step update algorithms.

AI.tldr: 提出Riemannian Residual Line Search方法，将一步扩散编辑中保守性与激进性的矛盾重构为后验候选选择问题，通过在黎曼流形上估计局部时间曲率修正编辑方向并利用CLIP对齐选择最优候选，在PIE-Bench++上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有一步扩散编辑方法因避免反演和迭代优化而很快，但单次传输更新必须同时满足对目标提示的激进性和对源图像的保守性，而固定的更新强度无法在所有编辑类型上兼顾这两个需求，存在根本性的张力。
AI.method: 提出Riemannian Residual Line Search方法，将编辑问题重构为能量场传输之上的后验候选选择问题；首先通过估计提示增量场的局部时间曲率来构建更强的编辑方向，并将其投影回原始一阶能量场传输估计的更新范数上；然后从源图像到该强编辑构建一条小的残差路径，保留原始一阶输出作为一个候选，最终通过最大化目标提示的CLIP对齐度来选择最终图像。
AI.result: 在包含10种编辑类型的700样本PIE-Bench++评估上，该方法在所有当前一步更新算法中达到了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了一步扩散编辑中保守性与激进性的矛盾可以通过后验候选选择而非设计新的编辑模型来解决，为高效图像编辑提供了新的思路。

title: IV-CoT: Implicit Visual Chain-of-Thought for Structure-Aware Text-to-Image Generation
summary: Unified multi-modal large language models (MLLMs) have achieved strong text-to-image generation quality, but still struggle with structure-aware prompt following, where object counts, spatial relations, attribute bindings, and coarse layouts must be preserved. We attribute this limitation in part to the entanglement of structural planning and appearance rendering within a single conditioning stream. To address this issue, we propose Implicit Visual Chain-of-Thought (IV-CoT), a latent visual reasoning framework for query-conditioned image generation. IV-CoT decomposes the visual conditioning queries into a structural-to-semantic cascade, where structural queries first form a latent visual plan and semantic queries then render appearance conditioned on this plan. To guide the structural queries, we introduce training-only sketch supervision, which encourages them to capture structure from sketches without requiring sketch extraction or intermediate decoding at inference time. IV-CoT performs implicit CoT reasoning in a single forward pass and achieves superior results on GenEval and T2I-CompBench. Visualizations and analyses demonstrate that the learned structural and semantic queries play complementary roles in structure-aware generation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出隐式视觉思维链（IV-CoT），一种隐式推理框架，通过将视觉条件分解为结构到语义的级联，在不增加推理开销的情况下显著提升多模态大模型在结构感知的图像生成任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 统一多模态大模型在文本到图像生成中虽质量优异，但在对象计数、空间关系、属性绑定和粗略布局等结构感知的指令跟随方面表现不佳，现有方法将结构规划与外观渲染纠缠在单一条件流中，限制了生成的结构可控性。
AI.method: 提出Implicit Visual Chain-of-Thought（IV-CoT）框架，将视觉条件查询分解为结构到语义的级联：先由结构查询形成隐式视觉计划，再由语义查询根据该计划进行外观渲染；同时引入仅在训练阶段使用的草图监督信号，指导结构查询从草图中捕捉结构信息，推理时无需草图提取或中间解码，仅通过单次前向传播完成隐式CoT推理。
AI.result: 在GenEval和T2I-CompBench基准上取得优于现有方法的生成效果，可视化与分析表明所学习的结构查询和语义查询在结构感知生成中扮演互补角色。
AI.conclusion: 隐式视觉CoT通过解耦结构规划与外观渲染，在不增加推理开销的前提下有效提升了多模态大模型的结构遵循能力，为条件图像生成提供了一种高效的隐式推理范式。
